
1a1(ka): / 'dus pa rin po che'i rgyud gzer mig gi le'u ste bco brgyad pa bzhugs so// // / 
1b1(ka): g.yung drung lha'i skad du na/
2a1(ka): ja dur so na rtsi pi ta/ a dkar ha trag mu la ram/ gang zag mi yi skad du na/
2a2(ka): 'dus pa rin po che yi rgyud/ gzer mig gi le'i bco brgyad pa'o// 'khor ba'i sems can
2a3(ka): thams cad 'dren pa'i dpal/ gshen rab ston pa'i mchog la phyag 'thsal lo// spyir na
2b1(ka): sems can gyi las kyang grangs mang ste bsam gyis mi khyab pa'o// 'jig rten gyi khams kyang bsam gyis mi khyab ste grangs mang ba'o// ston pa'i bka' yang bsam gyis mi khyab 
2b2(ka): ste grangs mang ba ste/ sngon dang po yang ston pa'i sku dang / bstan pa'i bon yang bsam gyis mi khyab pa zhig dar zhing rgyas so// 'jig rten gyi khams dang / sred pa'i grangs kyang bsam 
2b3(ka): gyis mi khyab pa zhig chags shing 'jig go/ sems can gyi las dang bye brag gi las kyang bsam gyis mi khyab pa zhig 'khor ning thar ro// dus 'di' gong / srid pa 'di' sngon/ 
2b4(ka): / 'byung ba 'di'i thog ma/ bskal pa 'di yi dang po la/ lha gang gi thugs rjes bzung nas/ ye lha sems kyi sgrin ma can gyi thugs rjes bzung ngo // bon gyi bstan pa gang dar na/ 
2b5(ka): ston pa gti rgyal yi mkhyen gyi bstan pa dar r/ srid pa'i rgyud gang 'phel na/ ye mu rgyung dkar po'i rgyu 'phel lo/ dus de tsam na yang / ston pa gti rgyal ye mkhyen gyis/ 
2b6(ka): dug lnga'i nad kyis zen pa'i sems can rnams la/ thugs rje chen po rab tu bskyed nas/ sku yis 'dul ba rnams la/ bstan pa sku yi dpe'u tsi bstan/ bstan pa de'i yin 
3a1(ka): // tan gyis/ sems can bsam gyis mi khyab pa zhig 'khor ba las thar pa thob go// sdug bsngal las bde gnas rnyed do// gsung gis 'dul ba rnams la/ bsgrags / 
3a2(ka): pa gsung gi dpe'u tsi bstan no// bstan pa de'i yon tan gyis/ sems can bsam gyis mi khyab pa zhig 'khor ba las thar pa thob bo// sdug bsngal las bde gnas rnyed do// 
3a3(ka): thugs kyis 'dul ba rnams la/ sgrub pa thugs kyi dpe'u tsi bstan no// bstan pa de'i yon tan gyis/ sems can bsam gyis mi khyab pa zhig 'khor ba las thar pa thob bo// 
3a4(ka): sdug bsngal las bde gnas rnyed do// dus de tsam na yang / ston pa'i sku dang gsung dang thugs dang / zhal mngon sum du bzhugs nas/ 'dren pa'i ston pa mdzad kyang / sems can gyi 
3a5(ka): las bsam gyis mi khyab pas/ sems can kyang bsam gyis mi khyab pa zhig 'khor ba las thar par ma gyur ro// sdug bsngal las bde gnas rnyed par ma gyur ro// ston pas kyang 
3a6(ka): thugs rjes zin cing srangs par ma gyur nas/ ston pa yang zhin tu thugs chad do// ston pa yang rab tu thugs chad do// shin tu sbyid lug go/ rab tu sgyid lug go/ de nas ston pa 
3b1(ka): gti rgyal yi mkhyen gyis/ 'di chen 'khor lo gling brtsigs kyi/ g.su khang pa rna'i gzhal yas na/ ye lha sems kyi sgron ma can/ bzhugs pa'i spyan sngar thal gyis byin/ 
3b2(ka): pus mo btsugs so// thal mo sbyar ro// zhal nas 'dzum pa byung / dbu btud lha phyag lan gsum btsal/ me tog pad ma 'dab brgyad pul nas 'di skad ces gsol te// ye 
3b3(ka): lha thugs kyi ye shes can/ bdag kyang skye ba snga ma la/ srid pa ye sangs gnas na mchis tsam na/ yab ni khri 'do d// yum ni kun shes so// bdag cag khye' spun gsum 
3b4(ka): mchis pa ni/ gcig ni khye' dag pa'o// gcig ni khye' gsal ba'o// gcig ni khe' shes pa'o// bdag cag khe' spun gsum gyis/ gsung du bon gyi sgor zhugs nas/ 
3b5(ka): sems bskyed dam pa gto rje slob dpon ni/ gto 'brum khri glog gi the can la/ srid pa stong rtses kyi bon nyan pas/ sreid pa'i gti thams gsum gyi sems can la thag
3b6(ka): sems can gyi las brtags pas/ shin tu sdug cing rab tu bsngal bar mthong / sems can gyi las ni/ la la ni skye/ la la ni rga/ la la ni na/ la la ni 'chi/ la la ni / 
4a1(ka): ga'o/ la lazni bsha'/ la lan 'sa/ la la ni reg/ la lani breng / la lzi shim/ la lzni 'tchol/ la lzhi ye/ la lzni 'hagla lbzhi/ 
4a2(ka): rtsod/ la la ni 'bres/ la la ni 'dod/ bltas pas zhin tu sdrug cing rab tu bsngal bar mthong / spun gsum dus pas mtshi ma khrag tu khol/ sems bskyed dam pa gto rje slob 
4a3(ka): dpon zhal na r/ phe ha a ma ngo mtshar che/ dag pa gsal bzhes pa gsum/ snying rje chen po skyes tshoMd kyis/ tshad med bzhi dang ldan par nges/ tshad med bzhi yi thugs rje yis/ 
4a4(ka): 'khor ba thar par 'dren pa yin/ sems can don la song zhig gsungs/ sems can rnams la snying rje skyes/ slob dpon lha yi bka' thob pas/ bdag cag ypun gsum sdod nas 
4a5(ka): mchis/ yab gcig sred pa khri 'd dang / slob dpon gto yi zhal na r/ khyed cag stun gsum der sdod dang / ji lthar sems can snying rje yang / ston pa gnyis kyis bstan pa byed 
4a6(ka): mi sred/ ji ltar sems can grangs mang yang / phung po gcig gis sems gnyis bsdus mi srid/ ji ltar mun pa'i tshogs che yang / nyi ma zung gcig gshib nas 'char mi srid// 
4b1(ka): snga rabs 'das pa rnams kyang re res bstan/ slad kyis byin pa rnams kyang re res ston/ khyed cag ypun gsum dus gsum ston par gshegs/ ston par rang bzhin shin tu dkon na / 
4b2(ka): btsun/ gnyis kyang mang du byas na gsum tsam gang du cha/ pu b dag pa 'jig rten ston par mdzod/ sku las 'od zer sprul sku mang po byung la/ stong gsum stong gi da ltar bzhugs 
4b3(ka): pa'i 'drin ston mdzod cigde skad ces gsungs te dbang bskur nas/ bdag 'dren pa'i ston pa la btang ba lags/ bdag gi nu bo gnyis/ slar mgon btsun pya yi grong khyer du ye 
4b4(ka): shes lha la g.sung drung gi con nyan du song / slob dpon dang yab gnyis kyang / bdag la nam zhig 'khor ba'i sems can ma thul na/ grub pa gzhen gyi gnas mchog sdogs la 
4b5(ka): thig cig gsungs nas/ dlur gzhen rab grub pa'i dbyings su gshegs so// de nas bdag gis kyang / skye ba mi'i lus blangs/ ming gti rgyal yi mkhyen du btags/ 'khor ba'i 
4b6(ka): sems can la gdung ba bskyed/ skus 'dul ba rnams la sku'i sprul pa bkyes nas/ bstan pa sku yi dpe'u rtses drangs pas/ sems can bsam gyis mi khyab pa zhig/ ngan song 
5a1(ka): / las mtho res su btang / 'khor ba las thar pa ru drangs/ gsung gis 'dul ba rnams las/ tshig gi gdams ngag bgyed nas/ bsgrags pa gsung gi dpe'u cis drangs 
5a2(ka): pas/ sems can bsam gyis mi khyab pa zhig/ ngan song las mthons su btang / 'khor ba las thar pa ru drangs/ thugs kyis 'dul ba rnams la/ thugs kyi ba na gbyen nas/ 
5a3(ka): / sgrub pa thugs kyi dpe'u ces srangs pas/ sems can bsam gyis mi khyab pa zhig ngan song nas mtho ras su btang / 'khor ba las thar pa ru drangs so// 'khor ba'i sems can rgya che 
5a4(ka): grangs mang yang / sku gsung thugs kyis drangs kyang / drangs par ma nus pa ci lags/ de skad ces zhus sam gsol pa dang / ye shes kyi lha ye lha sems kyi sgron ma can gyis bka' 
5a5(ka): bsrtsal pa/ gti rabs srid pa'i skyes bu chen po/ che snga bye dran pa las dge sdeg zhes pa/ gnas mto dman la rtogs pa/ 'khor bar sbyed lug nas zhus pa legs so// sku 
5a6(ka): yis drangs pa dang / gsung gis srangs pa dang / thugs kyis drangs pa'i sems can rnams ni/ sngon tshe bskal pa dang po nas/ las khre' ru spyad pa las/ kun gzhi las sa bon bzang 
5b1(ka): po yod pas/ sems la rig pa'i rtsal yod/ de lta bu sems can rnams/ rkyen sten pa'i bka' drag po dang 'phrad nas/ 'khor ba las thar pa thob pa dang / sdug bsngal la bade 
5b2(ka): gnas rnyed pa'i yon tan de lagsso// ston pa'i sku dangngo bo nyid kyis nal mngon sum du bstan kyang / sngon tcha bskal pa dang po nas/ madrangs pa'i sems can rnams ni/ gto 
5b3(ka): rabs srid pa'i bu / gto rgyal yi mkhyen lags/ de rnams ni shin tu yang drang dka' ba lags so// rab tu yang drang dka' ba lags so// sngon tche bskal pa dang po nas/ las sdig 
5b4(ka): pa ci tshugs su spyod pa/ kun gzhi la dge ba'i sa bon til 'bru tsam yang med/ dug lnga kha tshang ba'i tha ram gyis dam du bsdams pa yin te/ gto rgyal khyod bon gyi bka' bas / 
5b5(ka): kyang / bdag lha y thugs rjes kyang zien cing rangs pa lta bu mi 'gyur ro// sems can la la zhig ni zhe sdang me ltar 'bar/ sems can la la zhig ni 'dod chags chu ltar khol/ 
5b6(ka): sems can la la zhig ni gti mug mun ltar sris/ sems can la la zhig ni phrag dog s ltar skyes/ sems can la la zhig ni nga rgyal thlung ltar 'tshub/ sems can la la / 
6a1(ka): shig ni rag na srin po'i rigs/ de lta bu'i rigs la thar pa'i rgyu ma mchi'/ dper na nye ma la 'di zer shar kyang mun pa'i khang pa nag/ dedang mtshungs par sems / 
6a2(ka): can de'i rigs la/ nges tshig bstan kyang ma nyan skur pa 'dabs/ mi dge na tshogs spyad na sems can dmyal bar skye/ drangs kyang mi rang gti rgyal ma rangnges/ ngs kyang snying rje / 
6a3(ka): chen por rab bskyed nas/ khams gsum sems can 'di la rab tu gdungs/ chab kyi gram pa tsam zhig yar drangs kyang / chang 'gags shang ma tsam zhig mar la lhung / gnam 
6a4(ka): gyi skar ma tsam zhig yar drangs kyang / rtsi yi mchog ma tsam zhig mar la lus/ 'khor ba 'di la gting nas skyid pa lug/ rigs kyi bu gti rgyal/ sku gsung thugs kyi bstan 
6a5(ka): pas+dzogs nas grub pa'i gnas bsteg ran/ d skad ces yo zhes lha ya bka' b rtsal to// yang ston pa gto rgyal yi mkhyen gyis/ glung drug lha rtsosrid pa'i yul dkhyon/ sngon 
6a6(ka): blagsu tsogal yi bthar na na / sa b gyung dkad po bzlags pa'i spyan lam du/ dung bcug tal sbyar nal nas 'hrub byu te/ 'de skad cing g la'o// byesd pa'i / 
6b1(ka): rgyal po ye mu rgyung dkar po lags/ bdag cag sems can don la rab tu dgongs/ sku yi sprul pas bstan pa sku'i dpe'u tsi gzugs khams la bstan/ gsung gi sprul pas / 
6b2(ka): bsgrags pa gsung gi dpe'u tsi 'dod khams la bstan/ thugs kyi spul pas sgrub pa thugs kyi dpe'u tso gzugs med pa'i khams la bstan/ khams gsum 'khor ba'i gnas su // 
6b3(ka): sku gsung thugs kyi bstan pa s+dzogs/ khams gsum las kyis 'khor ba'i sems can nyon mongs kun rangs pas bde ba bas kyang ma drangs sdug pa mang / kyi sred pa'i mu rgyung dkar po / 
6b4(ka): lags/ bstan pa gcig la gnas pa las kyi thugs je ma chung dang / khams gsum stong par drangs pa'i bon zhig bdag la bstan du gsol/ gzhen gyis de skad ces gsol to// 
6b5(ka): de la mau rgyung gis bka' bstsal pa/ gto rabs srid pa'i bu gti rgyal ye mkhyen/ dbang po zhin tu gsal ba shes rab shin tu dngs pa/ snying rje'i sems dang ldan pa/ skyes bu chen 
6b6(ka): por 'khrungs pas/ zhus sam gsol ba ni szhin tu legs te/ nyid bas kyang bdag ni 'gro ba'i don la rab tu dgongs pa zhig lags so// shin tu yang dgongs pa zhig lags na/ 
7a1(ka): / h/ khams gsum drangs nas stong pa'i bon ni/ shein tu yang mi sred pa zhig lags so// rab tu mi sred pa zhig lagsso// desrid pa'i rgyu ma lags te/ sten pa'i thugs / 
7a2(ka): rje nye ma dang 'dra ste/ kun la snoms kyang sems can m rig pa ni/ brag tug kha byang du bltas pa dang 'dra ste/ 'khor ba'i sems can ni rgyu ngan/ chags pa'i dug lnga ni dbang che// 
7a3(ka): nyon mongs pa'i 'dod chags ni kha drag go/ de'i rang bzhin gyis nyid bas dus gsum tshang pa'i ston pa 'tshogs nas drangs kyang rang bar mi 'gyur ro// sku gsung thugs kyi bstan pa / 
7a4(ka): s+dzogs nas/ yang dag grub pa'i gnas bsnyeg tan/ ngas kyang srid gsum skye zhing 'chi ba'i khams gsum du/ legs par srid pa gtan la phab nas srid nas/ dkar ba ni nag por 
7a5(ka): song / yod pa ni med par song / gang bazhi stong par song / brtan pa ni 'gyur bar song / chags pa ni 'jig par song / skyes pani 'che bar song / khams gsum la dad pa skyo/ srid 
7a6(ka): gsum la yid dbyung / 'khor ba la skyed lug pas/ bdag ni 'jig rten 'dir srid pa'i rgyal por mi bgyid do// sred pas de skad ces bka' ba rtsal to// dere ston pa gto rgyal yi 
7b1(ka): mkhyen gyis thugs la dgongs pas/ lha dang ghen dang srid pa gsum/ bstan pa gcig la gnas pa la/ lha dang srid pa gnyis 'khor ba la sbyed lug/ phyir mi 'ong ba'i 'bras bu / 
7b2(ka): 'khor ba las mya ngan 'das so/ sngon dang po slob dpon dang yab gnyis kyi zhal nas kyang / nam zhig 'khor ba'i sems can mi 'dul tsam na/ grub pa gnhen gyi gnas mchog 
7b3(ka): stogs la zhog/ gsungs pa dus da lta yin par nges/ d bdag kyang 'gro ba'i don sang la/ 'khor ba mya ngan las 'da' bar dgongs nas/ 'da' khar khams gsum gyi sems can/ 
7b4(ka): thugs rjes ma drangs nas sdug cing sbyong ba rnams la/ zhal gzigs te gdungs shing bcums so// shin tu yang bzums so// rab tu yang bzums so// de nas bsums pa'i mtshil 
7b5(ka): ma phyag gis phyis nas/ zhal nas smon lam 'di skad ces btab bo/ bdag ni 'khor ba mya ngan 'das/ 'khor ba mya ngan 'das 'og tu/ 'khor ba'i sems can drang slad du / bar 
7b6(ka): gyi bskal pa gcig len nas/ thugs rje can gyi ston pa 'byin/ ston pa dbyen pa'i dus tsam na/ khams gsum gyi sems can sdug pa khyed rnams kyang / dus der sdug bsngal 
8a1(ka): / @/ las bde gnas rnyed par shig/ 'khor ba las thar pa thob par shig/ 'jig rten gyi khams 'di na/ nyon mongs pa shas chung ba/ dmu rgyal them pa skas dang / bya zag
8a2(ka): ng 'brang ma gnyis yin te/ bdag sku mya ngan las 'das kyang / gsung du zhig dkar po la/ gsu shes sngon po bras nas/ 'jig ten khams gsum sela bas gsung ma 'das kyis/ 
8a3(ka): de rjes su sems can rnams kyang / gsung rab kyi 'bru rtogs la/ bstan pa ni sungs shigdge ba ni se la cig sdig ni yongs shig gsungs nas/ sku 'khor ba mya ngan las 'das 
8a4(ka): so// de la mgon btsun bya yi yul du / gzung gsal ba la 'di skad ces gsungs so// bdag gis khams gsum gyi sems can rnams/ stong pa tsam zhig par drangs kyang / gang 
8a5(ka): brtsam zhig mar la lus/ 'khor ba la skyed lug nas/ 'jig rten gyi khams nas mya ngan las 'das nas 'ong ba yin/ da nyid 'jig rten gyi khams gsum 'gro ba 'dren pa'i 
8a6(ka): bstan pa la/ bar gyi bskal pa gcig len na 'dul ba'i dus la bab pa yin/ de'i dus su gshegs par gyis shig gsungs nas gti rgyal yang / grub pa gnhen gyi gnas 
8b1(ka): mchog dam para/ 'gro ba 'dul bar bya ba'i don du gzhiegs pa'o// snga rabs 'das pa'i le'u ste gcig pa'o// // gsung dung lha'i skad du na/ te byer ha ling gu g san/ gang zag 
8b2(ka): mi ye skad du na/ gnhen rab yab yum gyi le'u 'o// de ltar dus dang po la/ lha gang gi thugs rje yal na/ ye lha sems kyi sgron ma can gyi thugs rje yal lo// srid pa gang gi 
8b3(ka): rgyud zhig na/ ye ma rgyung dkar po can gyi rgyud zhig go/ can gyi bstan pa gang bub na/ gtae rgyal yi bkhyen gyi bstan pa thub g/ 'jig rten gyi khams kyang bskal pa sra 
8b4(ka): mo gcig gis mtho bcad dang zurg bskal tsam zhig go/ da 'di nas mar na/ dus 'di bskal pa 'di srid pa 'di 'byung ba 'di la/ lha gang gi thugs rjes 'dzin pa dang / gnhen gang / 
8b5(ka): gesg ston pa byed pa dang / sred pa gang gis rgyud se la ba'i/ lo rgyus dang gtan tshigs 'byung te/ phyir 'jig ten gyi khams/ rgya che ba grangs mngana yang / thub phyogs kyi 'jig 
8b6(ka): rten gyi gling / chu bo chen po bzhi' 'go/ lhe 'dzam bu gling gi mig/ sog kha nod kyi 'jig rten gyi skyabs/ gngs dbal so mdung rtsi' ra ba/ re gsung du dgu brtsigs kyi rtsa 
9a1(ka): b/ brag seng gi rgyab bsgol gyi bar/ sa parna 'dab brgyad kyi steng / gnam 'khor lo rtsabs brgyad kyi 'og/ shing gzha' tshen 'di 'bar gseb/ rtsa me tog na 
9a2(ka): tshogs kyi nags/ gnos bdud rtsi sman gyi tshal/ gnas ren po cha'i mkhar/ spul de' mngzhi 'ol mo lung ring / mkhar de' mangni bar po s brgyad/ gsas mkhar de'i meng ni 
9a3(ka): nam po lha rtse/ gnas de'i mang ni 'dzam bu gling gi mig bya ste/ mi la rigs bzhi mchis pa las/ rgyal po'i rigs su gtogs pa che ba dang / rje'u rigs su gtogs pa gtsang / 
9a4(ka): ba dang / bram ze' rigs su gtogs pa btsun pa/ rmangs kyi rigs su gtogs pa gdol pa dang bzhi'o// yul de na kun tshang pa yang / mkhar de'i rtsi rje ni/ rus pa ni dmu'o// 
9a5(ka): rigs ni rgyal rigs so// ming ni dmu rgyal len gyi them pa skas so// skyes bu chen po bzhugs pas/ rab tu sems nyid klong na bd/ 'gro ba'i don la byen pas/ sems can 
9a6(ka): la bu gcig ma ltar byams/ de'i btsun mo na phya a lhte khyab pa'i sras mo// phya zangang 'brang ma bgyis te/ de yang yab dang mtshungs te/ shin tu ngag 'jam zhing rab tu khong dal/ 
9b1(ka): sems can skye 'gro la byams pa'i sems dang ldan/ yab yum de gnyis 'gro ba'i don la dgongs nas sku yi sprul pa/ dbyed zla r ba'i ches brgyad la/ sras rgyal bu gcig sku / 
9b2(ka): 'khrungs so// 'khrungs pa'i dus der sems can thams cad kyang spro ba skyes nas/ la la yis sel btab/ la la yis zhus byas/ la la yis g.yang blan/ la la yis lha gsol/ 
9b3(ka): nang po bya kha rje bang po yis/ dung gi gnam yol dkar po la/ 'byug khyung gi res bcra dang / nye zla' 'di 'bar dang / mda' gang ba dbu la bcings nas/ smon lam btab pa/ dmung
9b4(ka): rgyal gyi sras rgyal bu khyod kyang / lha srin sde brgyad la bka' btsan zhing / skye 'gro sems can gyi don nus par shig cig/ gsungs so// rgyal bu de yang yab yum dang mtshungs 
9b5(ka): par/ shin tu khing dal zhing rab tu ngag 'jam/ bram ze' bu gsal khyab 'd ldan gyis mtshan brtags pas kyang / shin tu khong dal zhing rab tu ngag 'dzam/ mtshan bzang zhing rab 
9b6(ka): / tu mtshan par bcad/ ming dang mtshan yang mi bon lha bon yo boan na rgyal bon thaMd dkar du btags/ slob dpon 'drul gnhen ngag drag la/ 'dul ngag bden pa'i bon bslabs 
10a1(ka): / nas/ gte rgyud smrang rgyud sa le mkhyen/ dus de tsam na rgyal bu de'i gdng 'tsheb pa/ rten pa'i btsun mo zhag ma mchis nas/ sting khams su btsal bas ma rnyed do// 
10a2(ka): der lo bcu gsum len nas/ lha sren 'thab pa'i gzu mdzad cing bzhugs na/ 'khor gyi dam pa zhig mi gnyis rgyal bu zhal mzal zer nas/ 'phren snyan du zhus nas/ 
10a3(ka): rgyal bu yang bzhengs nas mi gnyis kyi drung du bzhud/ mi gnyis kyis kyang zhes lugs bzhin du prul nas/ rgyal bu la 'di skad ces zhus so// kyi rgyal bu lags/ bdag cag 
10a4(ka): gnyis pa s d lags so// yul ni mtsho mu la stong ldan had kyi 'gram lags so// khyim ni grong khyer lang ling gi dbus na mchis so// rgyal bu dang zhal mdal ba ni/ khab 
10a5(ka): kyi btsun mo zhag rgyal khams na/ sgra gtong gi gda' bas ma rnyed mchis na/ bdag rigs ni mangs rigs lags na yang / rgyal bu'i btsun mor rlung ba'i bu mi khyad par 
10a6(ka): 'phags pa zhig bdog pas/ rgyal bu'i btsun mor 'brul du mchis na/ bka' gnang 'tshal/ de skad ces rgyal bu la gsol pas/ rgyal bu'i spyan gyis gzigs pas kyang / 
10b1(ka): spyan ma blnyams/ thugs kyis dgongs pas kyang yid ma rangs/ mi gnyis po la 'di skad ces bka' b rtsal to// ye ma ya mtshan bad reo che/ bazhi g.yas nar/ bu ni / 
10b2(ka): g.yon 'thing / rigs ni rmangs rigs yin/ khyed la nga yi khab du bzhes su rlung ba'i bu mo skye ba'i lugs med kyis/ mi'i drung du de skad ces ma zer cig ng tsho'o// khyed la bu mo khyad / 
10b3(ka): par can zhig yod na/ dbyar zlar ba'i ches bco lnga la/ bdag grong khyer lang leng du gshegs nas/ mtsho mu lo stong ldan la/ sku khrus byed du phyin tsam na/ grong khyer lang leing gi 
10b4(ka): me rnams kyis mdun bsdu nas/ la las ni skor ba byed/ la las ni lha phyag byed/ la las ni me tog 'brul/ la las ni lhad mo byed na/ khyed kyi khyad par can de gang na nyar/ 
10b5(ka): shin tu ched chung ba gnyis rnang gis/ rab tu gsang dam du gyis la bhyir chos shig/ ng'i 'khor pas cos na bkyen 'bebs par 'gyur ro// gsungs nas rgyal ba yang bshengs nas 
10b6(ka): bzhud do// mi gnyis po yang yi chad nas song ngo // der lha srin sde brgyad kyi gtso ba dang / 'khor pa rnams kyi mchid nas/ rgyal bu lags gtam re mang / mi de gnyis su lags ci 
11a1(ka): / #/ mchis/ rgyal bu yang shin tu ngo tsha bar gyur nas/ s+dzun bsam nas bka' b rtsal pa/ mide gnyis ni shin tu nyon mongs pas/ bram ze gya nyes gnyis gda' 'o// //

105a1(ka): zer gyi bdangs ldan ma la phyag 'tshal lo// snyoms pa'i lha mo sman gyi cha snyoms ma la byag 'tshal lo// snyoms pa'i lha mo sman gyi rgyun 'dren ma la phyag /

105a4(ka): 'tshal lo// snyoms pa'i lha mo sprul pa sku yais snang srid 'dul la phyag 'tshal lo/ snyoms pa'i lha mo byin rlabs kyi stobs kyis mtha' bzhi gnon la phyag 'tshal lo//

105a6(ka): snyoms pa'i lha mo 'dren pa'i chu bos thugs rje rgyun du sel la phyag 'tshal lo// snyoms pa'i lha mo sgron ma'i nyi zer gyis sems can mnyam par snyoms la phyag 'tshal lo//

105b2(ka): pa'i lha mo dbus dang mtha' med snyoms pa'i thugs la phyag 'tshal lo// snyoms pa'i lha mo car yang ma grub ci la yang mi gnas pa la phyag 'tshal lo// snoms pa'i lha mo ma /

105b6(ka): sgra/ de nas yang gnhen rab gyi da lta bzhugs pa'i lha mo brgya'i mtshan brjod de/ btsun mos lha mo re re la phyag ri re btsal bas/ nam mkha'i lha mo mdangs ldan ma la phyag /

112b1(ka): rgyal rigs dra ma chen po gshen rab mi bo la/ dngos kyi mo bzhin bgyis na chab srid zin te mchi/ bu mo 'di ni khab du bzhes pa'i rigs legs so// de nas rgyal po dang ba yid /

112b5(ka): mngon sum du mtong zhing bka' rgyud mi 'chad par thob pa dang / g.sung drung gtsug gzhen rgyal ba'i dgongs pa'i byin rlabs dang / rgyal po dang ba yid rang gi 'bad rtsol gyi dad pa yis/ 
112b6(ka): sems can phyi ma lha a cang yang ches te/ 'dod pa che zhing chags pa drags pa'i btsun mo 'di yang sgrib pa byang nas snang ngo // tshogs s+dzogs nas snang ngo // de'i yon tan gyis sang 
113a1(ka): / h/ nye ma'i rtsa la gcig kyang ma lus par sangs rgyas te 'gro bas/ mtsho 'bri mig dgu skor la khus gyis la/ me tog sna tshogs thus la sang nyi ma'i rtse la/ rin po /

113a3(ka): dga' nas mchong / gshen rab kyis hos bza' rgyal med la dgongs pa mdzad pas/ nang gi sems dge la phyi yi yul bzang bzhig snang bas/ 'gro ba'i don mdzad pas/ sems

190b5(ka): 'phrin las kyi lha mo csho 'phrul cer yang ston la phyag 'tshal lo// 'phrin las kyi lha mo stobs mchog tshigs med mkhyen la phyag 'tshal lo// 'phrin las kyi lha mo drag 
190b6(ka): shul rtsal dang ldan la phyag 'tshal lo// 'phrin las kyi lha mo khams dang skye mched gsal la phyag 'tshal lo// ye shes kyi lha gshen lha 'od dkar ni sku mdog shel gyi snying / 
191a1(ka): i/ po 'dra/ rgyan dang cha lugs gzhal yas khang / shel la shal gyi 'od kyis rab tu mdzes par brgyan/ phyag mtshan g.yas na thugs rjes 'dren pa'i lcags kyu /

191a3(ka): shes kyi lha gshen lha 'di dkar gyi sku yi thugs rje las bskyed pa'i bde bar gshegs pa mi bcad kyi 'jig rten gyi byang phyogs na/ thugs rje thabs kyis 'gro ba'i don mdzad pa/ 
191a4(ka): sku'i lha rgod gsas khams pa la phyag 'tshal lo// sku'i lha rgod bu 'par drag la phyag 'tshal lo// sku'i lha rgod gss drag po rdul zhugs can la phyag 'tshal lo// sku'i /

191a6(ka): gi thugs rje las bskyed pa'i bde bar gshegs pa mi bced kyi 'jig rten gyi byang phyogs na/ thugs rje thabs kyis 'gro ba'i don mdzad pa/ gsung gi lha rgod gsas zer ldan 
191b1(ka): / stobs kyi thugs can la phyag 'tshal lo// gsung gi lha rgod gsas blo ldan grangs bdag btsan pa la phyag 'tshal lo// gsung gi lha rgod gss 'od zer lam pa la phyag 'tshal

191b4(ka): po'i gshog rtsal rje la phyag 'tshal lo// thugs kyi lha rgod gsas bskyed pa drag po ldan la phyag 'tshal lo// thugs kyi lha rgod gsas rig pa bskyed pa la phyag 'tshal lo//

191b6(ka): 'odi dkar gyi yon tan gyi thugs rje las bskyed pa'i bde bar gshegs pa mi bcid kyi 'jig rten gyi byang phyogs na/ thugs rje thabs kyis 'gro ba'i don mdzad pa/ yon tan gyi /

192b1(ka): lugs gzhal yas khang / dul la ddul gyi 'od kyis rab tu mdzes par brgyan/ phyag mtshan rin po che'i rgyal mtshan bsnams/ rin po che ltar bkra ba'i rlabs chen bya khyung 
192b2(ka): gnyis kyi gdan la bzhugs/ sprul pa sred nas 'gro ba'i don mdzad pa/ sangs po 'bum khri'i sku la phyag 'tshal lo// thabs kyi mchog sred pa sangs po 'bum khri'/ sku'i sprul / 
192b3(ka): pa las srid pa'i bde bar gshegs pa mi bced kyi 'jig rten gyi byang phyogs na/ thugs rje thabs kyis 'gro ba'i don mdzad pa/ sku'i srid pa ye rgyung mu pyod la phyag 'tshal lo//

193b5(ka): kyi phul ston pa gnhen rab mi bo ni/ sku mdog rin po che ltar bkra ba/ rgyan dang cha lugs gzhal yas khang / rin po che la rin po che yi 'od kyis rab tu mdzes par brgyan/ 
193b6(ka): phyag mtshan gser gyi chags shing bsnams/ rin po che ltar bkra ba'i 'khor lo dgu brtsigs gdan la bzhugs/ 'od zer bkye nas 'gro ba'i don mdzad pa/ gzhen rab mi bo'i / 
194a1(ka): sku la pbyag 'tshal lo// shes rab kyi dul ston pa gzhen rab mtso'i sku si 'di zer las bkye ba'i bde bar gshegs pa mi bced kyi 'jig rten gyi byang phyogs na/

194b1(ka): zer las bkye ba'i bde bar gshegs pa mi bced kyi 'jig rten gyi byang phyogs na/ thugs rje thabs kyis 'gro ba'i don mdzad pa/ thugs kyi gnhen rgyal ba gsang dang ldan la phyag /

194b3(ka): zer stobs ldan la phyag 'tshal lo// thugs kyi gzhen rgyal byed dbang thob la phyag 'tshal lo// shes rab kyi phul ston pa gnhen rab mi bo'i/ yon tan gyi 'od zer las bkyi

195b6(ka): yang gnhen rab kyis tsal sbyor gyi phyag rgya thugs kar gtad nas/ zhal nas sngags bsgrags nas brjod pa/ a dkar a rmad du tri su nag po zhi zhi mal mal/ sngags de skad 
196a1(ka): brjod nas/ 'dod pa rnam pa lnga'i ya stags rnams/ snying rje'i mgron rigs drug gi sems can rnams la ji ltar 'dod pa byin gyis rlabs kyin sprul pa mdzad nas//

8b1(kha): 'khor ba'i glang nas bdag mi 'gro/ 'khor ba'i glang nas bdag 'gror/ d rung 'gro ba'i don m s+dzogs/ da rang kye shi'i rgo mcsho// bdag 'khor ba mya ngan 'dag sgyau la/ sku gsung 
8b2(kha): thugs kyi don ma 'grub/ de grub tsam na sndod cig 'da'/ de skad ces gshen rab kyis bka' b stsal to// de la yang bdud kyis sblar smras ba/ ston pa gnhen rab mi bo khyod/ tshe 
8b3(kha): gcig las su dge ba spyod/ dge ba spyod pa'i don re chung / yi dam lha'i bka' gcig gam/ 'jig rten las ni byas kyin dka'/ 'khor ba'i lus ni blang gin sdug/ yi dam 
8b4(kha): / lha'i bka' ma bcag/ 'jig rten khams na mya ngan 'dis/ de skad ces bdud kyis smras so// de la yang gshen rab kyis bka' bstsal pa/ yi dam lha yang thugs re 'khrul/ 
8b5(kha): 'khor ba'i sems can mang po rnams/ rgyun du thugs rjes mi 'dren par/ sems can lam du bor cig pa/ lha'i bka' yang cang yin nam/ log pa'i mchad cig ma yin 
8b6(kha): nam/ kha na smra ba don du gyis/ 'jig rten las ni byas kyin yongs kyang dka'/ 'khor ba'i lus ni blang gin yongs kyang sdug/ rang gi lus la dpe long la/ gzhan la gnod pa 
9a1(kha): / seb bye/ ca n smra bdon d gyis/ 'bhags je sbabs du 'd/ dug bngal bdu kyi la bni bsgra'/ byams par ldan pa'i sem dang po// m 'byur gsung / 
9a2(kha): dung s la bkod/ de skad ces gzhen rab kyis bka' bsrtsal pas/ bdu khyab pa lag ting mtshang la seg nas byod kyi khros te ongs// de nas yangsan nyi ma'i rtse la/ nam 
9a3(kha): mkha' la sgra dang / 'od dang khu 'phang dang / zhu rungs byungno// de nas mkhar bar po s brgyad kyi kha la/ mi khro bo la rin po che 'bar bas lus la brgyan pa/ lag na sred pa sgos kyi 
9a4(kha): chag shing bsnams pa zhig/ gnhen rab mi bo zer gyin 'bod do// de la gshen rab ni rnam pa thams cad mkhyen pa yin pas/ bdud bslu ba la 'ong par mkhyen te/ lan gcig 
9a5(kha): bdud kyi nges ma bzungs par/ dal bu'i zhi bas gdul bar dgongs nas/ gsung pbyung nas/ yang zhes gsungs pas/ mi khra bo des gnhen rab la smras pa/ ka gnhen rab mi boston 
9a6(kha): pa'i mtshog'gro bsems can don cheng du gzhen rab ca cad 'or rgyal/ sems can la zhi gu gyun 'a/ nyid kyig tshod par gana 'bgyur/ zhi 'dan pa'i slob dpon yin/ 
9b1(kha): khyod kyi skye bsnga ma la/ shes rab rtsal thugs sbyang sbyangs pa/ 'brum khri klog gi the can yin/ gzhen rab log par byed pa khyod/ gtsol med 'gro don byed byed nasg/ sems / 
9b2(kha): can skyon gyi grib ma yis/ slob dpon yang cang shes sam/ 'gro ba'i don gyi ci zhig bya/ mya ngan gling nas da 'da' dan/ ngani khyod kyi bsu mar 'ong / rang cag 'gro la d lta 'dang / 
9b3(kha): de skad ces bdud kyis smras so// de la gshen rab kyis bka' b rtsal pa/ 'dren pa'i slob dpon thugs re 'khrul/ bdag gshen rab 'gro ba'i don la bskoMs/ 'khor ba'i gling nas 
9b4(kha): nga mi 'da'/ 'khor ba'i gling nas bdag 'da' ru/ da rung 'gro ba'i don ma grub/ da rung skye shi'i sgo ma chod/ bdag 'khor ba mya ngan 'da' rgyu la/ sku gsung thugs kyi don ma s+dzogs/ 
9b5(kha): de s+dzogs tsam na sdod cig 'da'/ de skad ces gnhen rab kyis bka' brtsal pas/ de la yang bdud kyis sbur smras pa/ ston pa gzhen rab mi bo khyed/ tshe gcig las su dge ba 
9b6(kha): / spyod/ dge ba spyod pa'i don re chung / 'dren pa'i slob dpon bka' gcog gam/ dug lnga nad kyis zin pa yi/ 'khor ba'i sems can rgyu ngan kun/ 'grogs kyis btul na phyir 
10a1(kha): byer gying / tha cig yung la sgro bskyes/ gdul ba mi thrul dug bsngal che/ 'dren pa'i slob dpon bka' ma bcag/ 'jig rten khams nas mya ngan 'dis/ de skad / 
10a2(kha): ces bdud kyis smras pas/ de la yang gnhen rab kyis bka' bsrtsal pa/ 'dren pa'i slob dpon thugs re 'khrul/ 'khor ba'i sems can mang po kun/ rgyun du thugs rjes ma 
10a3(kha): 'dren par/ sems can lam du bor cig pa/ lha'i bka' yang cang nges sam/ slob dpon bka' yang cang yin nam/ log 'dren mchid tshig ma yin nam/ log par byed pa'i 
10a4(kha): mchad yin na/ sems can las ngan chu bo' rgyun dang yongs dang 'dra/ ghyu rgyun dus gcig kho nar skam pa ga na srid/ thugs rje chu bo' rgyun bsreng la/ sems can drang bar 
10a5(kha): 'byung / da lta mya ngan gling nas 'das shig pa ni log pa'i tshig/ sems can gang zhig log par byed pa khyed// 'thugs rjzi' skyabs su tshur la 'dus/ sdug bsngal bdud kyi chu 
10a6(kha): bzhi myur la bsgral/ phyogs med byams par ldan pa'i sems dang 'phrad/ mi 'gyur g.yung drung bstan pa'i sa la 'god/ de skad ces gnhen rab kyis bka' b stsal pas/ bdud 
10b1(kha): khyab pa lag ring mtshang la phog nas/ yang pyed kyis bros te songso// de'i tshe de'i dus na/ bdud rje khyab pa lag ring de/ ha cang yid mug ga chad de/ ston pa gzhen rab mi bo la/ 
10b2(kha): bdud kyi cho 'phrul na gnyis rugs/ mya ngan khong du mun ltar sros/ mun nag 'thib pa'i kglong dkyil na/ thags mkhar rtse brgya' nang du byen/ bdud rje rgya lag tcod rje la/ khyab 
10b3(kha): pas smras nas shags shig btab/ 'o skol bdud kyi yid khams 'di/ med par stong du 'dzud pa'i maM/ gnhen rab slu bsdzun tshig mkhan/ drag po dmag gis ma bsad na/ zhi ba'i 
10b4(kha): thabs kyis ma bsus so// lha dang slob dpon gnyan snyam nas/ lha dang slob dpon gnyis kar sdzus/ slu tshig mang pos bslus pa la/ lha dang slob dpon bka' ma nyan/ bsdus pas 
10b5(kha): 'dreng par ma gyur nas/ da lha yid mug ga chad de/ yab kyi spyan sngar mchis pa lags/ d bdud kyi dmag tshogs d sud 'tshal/ bdud kyi go mtshon d gon 'tshal/ bdud kyi 
10b6(kha): mtshon tshogs da brdar 'tshal/ bdud kyi rna tshogs da stod 'tshal/ bdud kyi dan tshogs dan 'pbyar 'tshal/ gnhen gyi yul du dmag dang 'tshal/ yab gcig ma bzhugs dmag skoMs 
11a1(kha): / mdzod/ gshen rab mi bo ma sod na/ 'jig rten yod khams stong la khad/ bdud rje khyab pa lag ring gis/ yab la de skad smras nas zhus/ yab kyis sbur la bka'

11a3(kha): gyur rgyu la/ ghen rab srul pa stong dang ldan/ bdu kyi mun dmag phyir la 'gyrub/ mun pa nyid kyang sron bar 'gro/ bdud kyi mtshan gyis gnhen mosod// gzhen gyi lus zhi to 
11a4(kha): rje'i brag/ bdud kyi mtshon rnams phyir la 'chag/ gnhen rab mi bo sprul pa can/ gnyan par byed pa pa dang ma/ pha ma gnyis kyi chas su zhugs/ mya ngan gling nas 'da' ru 
11a5(kha): ghug/ ba ma'i bka' hi mi gcog ges/ de ltar bsdus nas rgyal te 'ang / drag pos me thub bshol bar bcad/ de skad ces bdu rgya lag tchod rjes bdu khyab pa lag rang la smras 
11a6(kha): so// yang bdud khyab pa lag ring des/ yab kyi bka' la bsdus te/ drag po bdud gyi dmag bshol nas/ zhi ba'i thabs kyis bslu ba'i phyir/ pa dang ma ru s+dzus thabs bstan/ gnhen 
11b1(kha): rab ston pa bslu ru song / de'i tshe de'i dus na/ ston pa gshen rab mi bo ni/ mkhar bar po sa brgyad kyi nang na gzims nas bzhugs tsam na/ bdud khyab pa lag ring gis/ pha'i 
11b2(kha): cha byad du thugs nas sngas su 'ong nas/ gnhen rab kyi dbu nas btegs nas smras pa/ bu ston pa gzhen rab mo bo khyed/ da rung 'jig rten gyi khams 'di na ston pa byed pa'i 
11b3(kha): lugs ci yod/ 'jig rten khams kyi sems can 'di rnams ni/ 'jig pa'am/ 'gul ba'am/ sgyu ma'am/ tha ga rgyu'am/ sgra brnyan nam/ rmiM lam lta bu zhig yin

12a1(kha): / kyis gzen rab la smra 'o// gzhen rab kyis bdu slu ba'i bang mkhyen te/ ngem bzungs par zhe bas 'dul dgongs na / de la gzhen rab kyi 'kbyeir la lan bka' /

12a3(kha): can nyon mongs rnams/ mi 'gyur thar par drang ba'i phyir/ 'gro don bsreng nas byed pa lags/ mya ngan 'dais shig gsungs pa ni/ yab kyi bka' de 'khrul pa lags/ bdag ni mya / 
12a4(kha): ngan mi 'da'// bdud dang srin po gdug pa can/ shin tu mi bzad gdug rub kyang / bdag la sprul pa bsam med mchis/ des tshugs par mi 'gyur ro// skyabs su gsol na bade / 
12a5(kha): bar bskod/ dragzhul byed na phyir la bsgral/ de skad cis gnhen rab kyis bka' b rtsal to// bdud khyab pa lag ring mtshang la pog nas/ phyod kyis med de songng // de'i tsho de'i dus 
12a6(kha): na/ yang phyi ste nam gyi tho rangs la/ gnhen rab kyi yum gyi cha byad du byas nas/ mkhar bar po so brgyad kyi rmeng nas/ mas yar gnhen rab zer gyin 'bod do// ston pas kyang 
12b1(kha): bdu slu ba byed par rig te/ nges ma bzangs par chad kyis 'dul bar dgongs nas/ yang gsungs pas/ bdud kying smras pa gzhen rab/ ngani khyod kyi ma lus kyi sgrom bu/ yo phye rgyal / 
12b2(kha): bzhed ma bya ba yin no// khyed btcol med 'gro don byed byed na/ sems can mang po'i grib ma yis/ ma rungi yang cang zhes sam/ ma'i ngag la bu khyod rton/ ' brus las spyed 
12b3(kha): log pa spyad/ bon zhes bya ba s+dzun par song / ngas kyang gsen cho bon spyad na/ she nas sems can dmyal bar skye/ de sngon tsha ba brgyad du bsregs/ da ni grang ba brgyad du 'gro/ tsha 
12b4(kha): grang gnyis kyi bar skabs su/ da lta khyed dang 'phrang du 'ong / bon gyi rnam smin de ltar byung / d khyod kyis bon 'di mkbyed bar/ mkhor las ngan bon spyad na/ ng bzhin dmyal bar

13a1(kha): u/ du bon gyi bstan pa mi bden s+dzun/ s+dzun po de'i las spyod ye mkhyed/ de skad bd kyis gzhen la smras so// de la ghen rab kyis bka' brtsal ba/ sum gcig /

13a5(kha): ma'i ngag ma yin/ gang zhig nyon mongs mar s+dzus cig/ bdag la nyams len byed par nges/ bsam pa ngan pa'i sems bor la/ gnhen rab nga'i skyabs su 'dus/ gsung dung bon la

13b1(kha): na/ bdud rje khyab pa lag ing d// ha cang yid mug ga chad de/ ston pa ghen rab m tsa la/ yang bdud kyi tshe 'brul rna gnyis rugs/ mya ngan khong du mun ltar sris/ mun nag

13b5(kha): tshogs d bsdu 'tshal/ bdud kyi go tshogs d goin 'tshal/ bdud kyi mtshon tshogs d brtar 'tshal/ bdud kyi na tshogs da stoid 'tshal/ bdud kyi dan tshogs d 'byar 'tshal/ gnhen

14a1(kha): rang gis/ sab la de skad ces smras nas zhus/ zhus pa'i ting la tkho bdag brgyal/ kha yang lhag par ral nas 'ong / de la yab kyang mya ngan byed/ bdud kyi 'khor pa /

14a6(kha): 'bum gyis bskor/ sdug bsngal mya ngan sgra sngags kyis/ bdud yo so so zen nas 'dug/ 'di'i rgyu 'bras ci ltar lags/ bdud bon mkhas pas bshad du gsol/ de skad ces 
14b1(kha): bka' blon gyis gsol to// de la bdud con kyis slar lan btab pa/ bdud rje khyab pa brgyal ba dang / bdud kha lhag par ral pa dang / bdud 'khor mya ngan byed pa rnams/ gzhan ma /

14b3(kha): bya/ gnhen rab s+dzun zer ci ste bya/ g.sung drung 'phrul ngag bon spyod na/ dmyal bar skye ba'i lugs yod dam/ khyab pa'i bsam pa ngan pa yis/ g.sung dung bon la sdzun yin byas 
14b4(kha): pas lan/ da yang bka' blon sar chos la/ bdud 'khor mya ngan 'phro tchod la/ gnhen rab phyogs su lha phyag gyis/ bon la skur pa btab pa bshags/ de ltar gzhung bzhin byas 
14b5(kha): pas na/ bdud rje brgyal ba seMs ste 'ang / bdud kha ral ba rlub te 'ang / bdu 'khor mya ngan chad de 'ang / bdu con gyis de skad lan btab go// bdud kyi bka' blon phyir la log/

15a1(kha): s+dzun yin byas pas lan/ mtsol bshags byas na sos te 'ong / mya ngan 'phro tshad btsol bshags bya/ de skad ces nas/ bd kyi 'khor mang po gshen rab phyogs 
15a2(kha): su lha phyag 'tshel zhing bshags pa phul lo// bshags pa ni/ bdud kyis bka' blon gyis 'di skad pul lo// bdud kyi blon ngan pbhyin ci log/ pbhyin ci log gi las ngan gyis/

15a6(kha): la dad pa skyes nas/ 'di skad ces smras so// stong gsum mnga' bdag srid gsum 'dren pa'i yab/ bdud rtsi bka' lung 'gro ba yongs kyi gsoMs/ khyad par can gyi skyes mchog khyed 
15b1(kha): la bdag cag skyabs/ da yang 'gro ba sems can ma lus thams cad kun/ g.yung drung bon la skur pa btab na/ sems can dmyal bar skye/ bskal pa du mar sdug bsngal 
15b2(kha): nyams du myong / bon la s+dzun pa'i skur pa yi ma 'dabs/ d pa skyed la bon la skyabs su gngol/ thar pa'i bde gnas thob par gdon ma za/ cen pos bon mi spyod pa bdu kyi / 
15b3(kha): rigs nyid yin/ bsdus kyis skur pa btab kyang mi 'gal lo// de skad ces smras nas/ gnhen rab kyi phyogs su 'phyogs ste song no // de'i tsho de'i dus na/ bdud khyab pa brgyal ba /

15b6(kha): yab bdud rgya lag thoMd rje'i sras khyab pa lag ring la smras pa/ bdud rje khyab pa lag ring lags/ log par mi ston yab la gson/ bdud kyi mun dmag bsdu rgyu la/ bdud rje nyid 
16a1(kha): y/ kyes mtshor ram/ ra nyid glo bur banhar brgyal/ ba yang lhag pa ral te'o/ bdagadg bdu kyi 'thor pa blan/ dela myangon ban lta ro/ dmgcogi
16a2(kha): mtshon ga na dran/ bdun bon chu lhags spyan pu zhus/ ban la s+dzun yin byas pas lan/ mtsol bshags drag po gyis shig gsungs/ bdag cag rnams kyis mtsol 
16a3(kha): bshags byas/ mtsol bshags de'i yon tan gyis/ nyid kyang brgyal ba seMs pa yin/ kha yang ral pa rub pa yin/ gnyid log pa yis ci ma tshad/ da yang gros kyis mdor bsdus 
16a4(kha): la/ gnhen rab srag pos mi thub nges/ 'di la sprul pa bsam med yod/ drag po dmag cig drang pa na/ rang ro'i dmag kyang kho la zhr/ phyi ma'i dmag kyang kho la 'tshor/ zhi bas dang / 
16a5(kha): rlung srus la drings/ skye 'gro sems can thams cad kun/ nor dang zas la kun ka dga'/ rigs po rigs mo kun kas 'dod/ rigs dang nor la srus la drngs/ bdud kyi dmag 
16a6(kha): tshogs lkog tu smos/ drang pa'i dus su soMd la thongs/ de skad ces bdud rjes bu la smras so// bdud khyab pa yang de ltar yin par bsams nas/ yang gshen rab bslu rnu chas so// de'i 
16b1(kha): dus de'i tshe na/ ston pa gshen rab mi bo ni/ gsas mkhar sham po lha rtsi la/ 'khor g.yung drung sems dpa' lnga stong lnga brgya dang mchod pa 'brul na/ 'ol mo lung rang gis skas 
16b2(kha): zhig gi kha nas/ gzhen rab mi bo zer gyin 'bod pa zhig yod d// ston pa ghen rab mi bo ni/ rnam pa thams cad mkhyen pa'i ye zhes dang ldan pa lags pas/ bdud kyi slu ba 
16b3(kha): po yin pa ni mkhyen te/ nges ma bzungs par zhi bas gdul bar dgongs te/ 'bod pa'i drung du byin nas/ skyes bu rta dang go mtshon du ldan pa brgya dang / skyes bu nor dang zas su ldan pa 
16b4(kha): brgya dang mzal lo// skyes bu brgya po de rnams kyis gnhen rab la gsol ba/ ston pa gnhen rab mi bo lags/ bdag cag rnams ni khyed kyis ngo cang mkhyen nam/ ngo ma 
16b5(kha): mkhyen na brgya ni lha'i tshing dpon nor la dbang sgyur bya ba lags so// brgya ni dbal gyi dmag tshogs drag po'i rtsal ldan bya ba lags so// da lta khyod kyi spyan sngar mchis so//

17b1(kha): la ma bzhag na/ bdag bstod gzhan shad drag zhul gdug rsub kyis/ mi rtagzhi ba'i yul du gcod sbyong dmyal bar skye/ sdug bsngal nyams su myong ba'i dus su 'gyod kyang mi /

17b5(kha): mkhyen te/ nges ma bzungs par zhi bas gdul bar dgongs te/ 'bod pa'i dung du byen nas/ na chung gser la gsu yais ni brgyan/ dara la zab kyis zhi brtsigs/ dkar la dmar du

18a2(kha): don bor la bdag don mdzod/ gzhon nu dar ba'i tshe 'di la/ skyed par bya ba bro glu yin/ dga' ba bya ba rtsi 'djo yin/ dgos par bya ba zla rigs yin/ bdag cag bu mo 'dir

18a5(kha): rnams ci mi zer/ ston pa'i las ni snying rje yin/ snying rje' don gyis sems can drangs/ lus dang srog gidon phyer yang / 'gro ba sems can don mi 'bor/ gzhon nu dar ba'i tshe 
18a6(kha): 'di la/ sems can thar par ma drangs na/ rgas kyin rgyud pa'i dus tsam na/ 'gro ba 'dul bar ga la 'gyur/ skyed par byed pa bro glu ga na yin/ ye shes lha yi snying po ma nor par/ 
18b1(kha): 'gro ba'i bag chags sbyang na skyed pa yin/ dga' ba bya ba rtsi 'dzo ga na yin/ sems can nyon mongs 'dring na dga' ba yin/ dgos pa bya ba bud med ga na yin/ thabs chen 
18b2(kha): dbyings la rol na dgos pa yin/ mi 'gyur gsung dung rnyed na gtan gyi grogs su bzang / mi snang snang bar zhes na ma 'bral grogs dang 'grogs/ bdag don lhun gyis grub na 
18b3(kha): gzhan don rtse ru tshebs/ nyon mongs log par 'khrul pa'i bu mo rnams/ ya gade rnams bdud kyi slu tshig 'ra/ 'khor ba rgyun du mi chad pa ni bud med yin/ srin mo dngos su

18b5(kha): yin/ bde ba thams cad mi bde gcod syong zangs des byed/ bud med bya ba dmyal ba'i zangs kha yin/ khyod dang 'bag na dmyal ba'i zangs su 'tshad/ dmyal ba'i zangs su 'tshad gal 
18b6(kha): gnhen rab nga la med/ bud med bya ba bdud kyi btsen ra yin/ khyod dang 'brel na bdud kyi btsen ras sdom/ bdud kyi btson ras sdom gal gnhen rab nga la med/ bud med bya ba ghin 
19a1(kha): / rje'i gdis thag yin/ khyed la dad na gzhin rje'i gdis kyis 'digs/ gzhin rje'i gdis kyis 'dogs gal gzhen rab nga la med/ bud med bya ba dug gi 'dab s+dzab 
19a2(kha): yin/ khyed la spyod na dug 'dam spyod pa yin/ gsod pa'i dug 'dam spyod gal gnhen db nga l me// khyod dag nyid kyang po la dad na gong du thos par bsam/ 'khor ba cag tshad

19a6(kha): / skol bdud kyi yod khams 'dir/ med par stongs su 'dzud pa'i mi/ gnhen rab slu ba s+dzun tshig mkhan/ drag po dmag gis ma bsad na/ zhi ba'i thabs kyis mi thul lo// sems / 
19b1(kha): can thams kcad mtshan nyid ni/ nor la d kyin rigs la dga'/ rigs l bstan gyi zhir lakhri/ slu tshig mang pos bsung pa la/ rigs la chags su m 'dod // ner la / 
19b2(kha): bsdus su ma 'dod do// de ltar yid chad ga mug nas/ yab kyi spyan spu mchis pa lags/ de ni bsla bar mi 'gyur nges/ yab gcig rgya lag thod rje lags/ bdud kyi dmag

19b4(kha): rab kyi yul du dmag drang 'tshal/ yab gcig ma bzhugs dmag skos mdzod/ ghen rab mi bo ma sod na/ 'jig nyen yongs khams stong la khad/ bdud rje khyab pa lag ring

19b6(kha): dmag gis thub par gnhen mi 'gyur/ dmag gis thub par 'gyur rgyu la/ gnhen rab sprul pa stong dang ldan/ bdud kyi mun dmag phyir la dbub/ mun pa nyid kyang sgron mar 'gro/ 
20a1(kha): bdu kyi mtshan gyis gnhin mo'o// bdu kyi mtshen gyis gnen sd du/ gzhen gyi lu zhi rdo rje' bragbdu kyi mtshon rnam kbyer la 'chag/ bdu rje khyab pa /

25a2(kha): gzhen rab kyis 'khor rnams la bka' bsrtsal pa/ phyogs bzhi mtshams bzhi kun ka nas/ mun nag 'thebs nas byung pa dang / drag po 'di dang sra byung pa/ sdeig can bdud kyi 
25a3(kha): mun dmag yin/ 'jigs sems ma skye snying rje bskyed/ bdud kyis khyod la mi tshugs kyi/ phyag rgya thal sbyor snying khar ston/ snying po 'di skad pcog dgu bzlas/ a dkar a cad du 
25a4(kha): dri su nag po zhi zha mal mala/ ston pas 'khor la de skad gsungs/ 'khor gyis gsungs pa bzhin du bgyis/ gnhen rab ston pas de bstan pas/ bsam pa phyag rgya snying po yis/ 
25a5(kha): bdud la 'jigs pa'i sems can rnams/ mi 'jigs pa'i stobs dang ldan/ bdud rje khyab pa lag rang gis dbang du bsdus su ma 'das so// mun pas g.yogs dang ma g.sogs so// 
25a6(kha): mtshon gyis bsad du ma sod do// de nas yang gshen rab kyis bdud khams dbang du sdud pa'i sprul pa mdzad de/ thugs zhi ba'i ngang las ma g.yis kyang / sku khro ba'i cha lugs su sprul 
25b1(kha): nas/ 'khor la bdud kyis tshur mi tshugs par byas pa'i rnying la/ bdud khams dbang du bsdu ba'i don ched du / dbal gyi khro bo chen po bzhi bskyed de phyogs bzhir bzhugs su gsol/ 
25b2(kha): ston pa nyid gser gyi 'khor lo stong brtsegs pa'i khra la bzugs/ dum hu mtshan dang dpe byad brgyad zu sku la rab tu mdzes par brgyan/ dbu ladrin po tcho'i za'phreg dgu 
25b3(kha): brtsegs gsol/ phyag rgya ser mo bcu gdngs mtho bang gnyis gshibs/ ser mo'i rgyab thugs kar gtad/ zhal nas snying po brjod pa/ a ling dag po 'bar ba hu dum ram/ ha 
25b4(kha): trag yongs khyab klung 'gyur trag ma b+yro/ 'o he shed hted rag ma tra ma thun/ thogs pa shag tshal drag ma mu 'bar ram/ de skad gsungs pas/ ston pa'i thugs rje byin rlabs kyis/ 
25b5(kha): drag po bdud kyi dmag tshigs kyang / bde bzhi ba'i sems dang ldan/ mun pa gnhen la gtib pa yang / thugs rjes nyi ma'i zer du song / bdud kyi mtshan csnon po yang / gzhen 
25b6(kha): rab sku la 'pangs pa rnams/ me tog pad ma'i char par song / bdud kyi go cha sra ba yang / g.yung dung ri mo 'bar bar song / bdud kyi dan tshogs phyar ba yang / lha yi gzhal yas khang 
26a1(kha): / de'ong / bdu kyi n tshigs rgyug pa yang / bra nas gnein la rgyug mbus/ bdu dmag mang pos bltas pa la/ brjed pa'i sku ru bzhugs pa si/ gshen rab ston / 
26a2(kha): pa'i phyogs bzhi na/ dbal gyi khro ba chen po ban/ ma bzad zhin tu 'jigs pa'i sku/ sku mdog mthing nag brjid dang ldan/ dbu yang dgu la zhal yang gdangs/ phyag kyang bca/ 
26a3(kha): brgyad par yang gdng / zhabs bzhis gnon yongs su bsgyad/ khro ba bzhi yi znabs 'og na/ bdu dmag dung byur ster nas 'dug/ bris pa'i s phyogs yo ka bgag/ bdu kyi / 
26a4(kha): dmag tshigs khred cing rangs/ bdud rje khyab pa sngangs nas 'dar/ de la ston pas bka' b rtsal pa/ nges pa'i don dam ma rtogs pa'i/ bdud kyi dbag tshigs snying ro tje/ zhe sdang ma ltar 
26a5(kha): 'bar ba yis/ 'jig rten 'di na nyon re mongs/ phyi ma'i gnas su snying r rje/ btso bsreg dmyal ba'i gnas su skye/ nges pa'i don dam martogs pa'i/ bdud kyi dmag tshogs snying r 
26a6(kha): ji/ 'dod chags chu ltar 'tshol ba yis/ 'jig rten 'di na nyon ro mngs/ bhye ma'i gnas su nying ro rje/ bkres sgom yi dgs gnas su skye/ nges pa'i don dam matogs pa'i/ 
26b1(kha): bdud kyi dmag tshogs snying roe rje/ gti mug mun ltar sros pa yis/ 'jig rnyen 'di na nyon re mongs/ phyi ma'i gnas su snying re rje/ byil song glin lhugs gnas su skye/ nges pa'i / 
26b2(kha): don dam ma rtogs pa'i/ bdud kyi dmag tshogs snying re rje/ phrag dogs ltar skyes pa yis/ 'jig rten 'di na yon re mongs/ phyi ma'i gnas su snying re rje/ mtha' 'khob ma ya 
26b3(kha): gnas su skye/ nges pa'i don dam ma rtogs pa'i/ bdud kyi dmag tshigs nying ra rje/ nga rgyal bung ltar 'tshub pa yis/ 'jig rten 'di na nyon re mongs/ phyi ma'i gnas su snying re rje// 
26b4(kha): lha min 'thab rtsod gnas su skye/ nges pa'i don dam ma rtogs pa'i/ bdud kyi dmag tshogs snying ro rje/ 'du shes log par gol ba yis/ 'jig rten 'di na nyon re mongs/ phyi ma'i 
26b5(kha): gnas su snying ro rje/ pham lhung lha yi gnas su skye/ thams cad mkhyen pa'i don ston pa'i/ mnor nges pa'i lung bstan gyis/ nga yi 'khor gyi dam pa yis/ mi 'gyur g.yung drungs 
26b6(kha): la 'god/ ston pas de skad ces gsungs pas/ bdud sren can gyi dmag tshogs mang po yang / shin tu dad pa'i sems skyes nas/ phyogs bzhi nas bshags pa pul nas sku la 
27a1(kha): skyabs su gsol lo// bshags pa'i tshig bshad 'di skad cis kun gyis smras so// thod ting ze'pdrog rgyan gyi me bub rgyal mtshan 'dzugs/ nye zla sbron ma'i zhal / 
27a2(kha): bzhin phyogs bcu yongs la gsal/ rin chen 'bar ba'i sku mchog thun mong men par brjid/ gser gyi 'khor lo dbang gis stong gsum khyab par bsgyur/ 'gro ba'i don mdzad 
27a3(kha): sems can yongs kyi dpal dang mgon/ thugs rje thabs kyis sems can nyon mongs 'dren mdzad pa/ sprul pa'i sku dang ldan pa'i gnhen rab ston pa'i mchog/ mi yangs sems 
27a4(kha): can don la thang bcad log sgrib sel/ skyes mchog sku la dmag tshogs dbal bstan shin tu 'gyod/ 'gyod sems dad pas bslebs nas da lha bshags par 'brul/ skye ba dpag 
27a5(kha): med man chad d lha'i sdeg bsags pa/ bder gzhegs znal mtsong nabs dung du gtugs te bshags par 'brul/ ma rig ji snyed sdeg bsags sgrib pa mun pa 'ara/ 'gyod sems 
27a6(kha): mos pa'i dad pas gnhen rab sku la skyabs su mchi/ 'khor ba sdug bsngal chu rgyun 'dra ba chad par 'gyur/ mi 'gyur g.yung drung stobs ldan sa la gnas par zhog/ de ltar smon 
27b1(kha): lam tshig bzhi tshigs su bcad pa bzhi/ sems can dad pa skyes pa can gyi ston pa'i spyan sngar btab/ smon lam de'i dbang gis kun kyang bde bar 'gyur/ bdud kyi dmag tshogs / 
27b2(kha): bcoms pas gnhen rab 'khor dang ldan/ bdud rje khyab pa yid mug ga chad cig pur yul du bris te songso // bdud rje khyab pa lag ring des/ ston pa gnhen rab mi bo la/ bdud kyi 
27b3(kha): tsho 'drul sna dg tugs/ mya ngan khong du mun ltar sres/ mun nag 'theb pa'i dkyil rnam na/ thags mkhar rtse brgya' nang du byin/ bdu rje rgya lag cod rje la/ khyab pas 
27b4(kha): smras nas shags shig btab/ 'o skol bdud kyi yod khams 'di/ med par stongs su 'dzud pa'i mi/ gnhen rab slu ba s+dzun tshig mkhan/ cho 'phrul sna dgus ma thub go// bdud kyi / 
27b5(kha): 'khor ba 'bum sde ni/ phyir la kho yi 'khor du zhor/ de yang yab gcig ci tsug mdzad pa/ gzhen ni thub par mi 'gyur ro// de la yab kyis bu la smras pa/ cho 'phrul sna dgus 
27b6(kha): ma thub rtugs/ da ni brgal ba'i thabs med do// de skad pas smras pas ni/ bu ni phyir la mya ngan skyes/ bdud rje khyab pa lag ring de/ mya ngan khang pa'i nang du zhugs/ re ba'i go 
28a1(kha): cig nag po yis/ mbag dang lag pa gnyis ka btam/ sgre sngags 'don kyin du mo 'dbs/ mya ngan 'don gyen mun pa gtibs/ bdu kyi bstan pa de ltar brub/ 
28a2(kha): gzin rab kyi bstan pa de lta da/ gzen rab la bdud kyi tsho 'brul bstan pas/ na dg tugs pa'i le'u ste bzla pa'o// // gsung dung lha'i skad du na/ 'de nam 'bar ba 'bring 
28a3(kha): tig shag/ gang zag mo'i skad du na/ gnhen rab kyi 'khor la bdud kyis cho 'prul bstan pa'i le'u 'o// de'i tsho de'i dus na/ bdud rje khyab pa lag ring de/ ston pa gnhen rab ma bo / 
28a4(kha): la/ tsho 'drul na dg rugs nas 'gyod/ mya ngan khang pa'i nang du bzhugs/ rgyun du mya ngan byed pa la/ bdud kyi ma sring mang po 'dus/ bdud rje khyab pa lag ring gi ma sren thun btang 
28a5(kha): ma mos bu la smras pa/ bdu rje khyab pa lag ring khyod/ ma yi ngag la bu 'dir gson/ gnhen rab m tso mathab pas/ mya ngan rgyun du mkbyed dang / pam rgyal bya bakun la 'byung / 
28a6(kha): mya ngan khang pa nang nas 'byung / lcags mkhar sgo brgya'i nang du 'ding / bdud kyi nang 'khor 'bum sde gsum/ 'bum sde gcig gis btsal gyin 'ong / 'bum sde gcig gis bsad 
28b1(kha): kyin bshal/ 'bum sde gcig gis gtub kyin 'dren/ gnhen rab mi bo mathub pas/ mya ngan rgyun du mkbyed dang / bdud kyi chu bzhi skam snyam na'ang / bdud kyi chu bzhi ma 
28b2(kha): skam par/ d rung skye 'khor byed pa mang / bdud kyi 'khor ba 'bum sde gsum/ gsd bsha' bza' dang gsum po la/ sngan bas su 'ung rgyu med/ bdud rje khyab pa yar bzhings dang / mya 
28b3(kha): ngan ma byed sems bskyed dang / 'khrug pa pham rgyal rim gyis 'ong / gnhen rab tsam nas thub kyang sred/ da rang cho 'phrul bstan thabs yod/ mas bu la de skad ces smras so// bdud 
28b4(kha): rje khyab pa lag rang gis ma la phyir lan btab pa/ 'jig rten khams kyi sems can la/ 'o skol bdud las kha sdrag med/ 'o skol bdud kyi nang rigs la/ khyab pasg las dbang 
28b5(kha): che med/ bdud rje khyab pa lag ring gis/ sems can yongs la dbang bsgyur nas/ dus la rgyug log 'di lta bu/ nga'i gong na dbang che ba/ s+dzun tshig mkhan gyi gnhen rab 'dis/ 
28b6(kha): sems can dbang du 'dir bsdus pas/ nga la dbang ni ci yang med/ gnhen rab par la 'dul du phyin/ par la thul bar ga na 'gyur/ tshur la bdud 'khor grangs med pa/ kho yi dbang 
29a1(kha): gis bsdus te 'ang / bdu rje khyab pan bdag gcig pu zhig ding bad sho// 'di las nga la dgra ru gnas pa gana yod/ de la mya ngan gdung ste ci ste ma bgyid lags/ 
29a2(kha): mya ngan khang pa nang nas ngani mi 'byungngo // 'di la thub thabs ma la ci lta bu mngal/ cho 'brul 'os pas skyon can deo mi thub go/ cho 'bhrul bstan thabs mnga' yi gsungs pa ma 
29a3(kha): la ci lta bu mnga'/ mya ngan khang pa nang nas dbyung la gnhen dang 'thab tu 'gro/ gshen rab ma thub bar du ng yi snying mzhon/ mya ngan khang pa nang nas mi 'byungngo// de skad ces bdud 
29a4(kha): khyab pa lag rang gis ma sring thun dang ma mo la smras so// yang mas bu la phyir smras pa/ gnhen la cho 'phrul mi ston par/ mya ngan khang pa nag po nas/ bdud rje khyab pa mi 'byung 
29a5(kha): na/ gzhen la csho 'brul bstan thabs bstan/ gshein rab mo bo ma thub kyang / bstan pa bshig gin dma' thabs yod/ dang po yul la csho 'prul ston/ sman dang 'bru bcud 
29a6(kha): thams cad dang / rtsi shing thams cad rtsad nas byung / yul la chags pa'i rten med na/ gshen rab mi bo ci la 'khor/ bstan pa nub pa de yin no// nam gyi par byed tshur phyed 
29b1(kha): shen du gcom nas byason/ gzen rbsul pa tsho ba'o/ dnyad cesm bral bhya 'o/ bdu r byab pa grong // gyingznh co pon n phyar/ bdo 
29b2(kha): dmag lhag ma mang po sgrug/ ya ki sgra lo sbyar byur nas/ bsu' bra g.yan chad dang / bdu kyi dmag tshogs mang po sul/ bdu kyi sta ra pa 'byams dang / bdu kyi zer bsdig 
29b3(kha): thod gnyis/ bdu dmag lag tu re r bskur/ bdud rje khyab pa lag rang gis/ dmag la gdams ngag smras pa'i mod/ bdud kyi dmag tshigs mang po kun/ gnhen rab mo bo gnas / 
29b4(kha): pa yi/ ghen yul 'ol mo lung rang na/ skyes pa'i 'bru bcud rtsi shing rnams/ bdud kyi sta rnon ste'u rnon gyis/ gcig kyang lus rgyu med pa ru/ rtsa basdung nas chod kyen byung / 
29b5(kha): yul la yon tan bcud med na/ gnhen rab 'khor bcas ci la chags/ 'on tang bstan pa thub ste 'gro/ ghen rab kyi bstan pa brub pa na/ 'o skol bstan pa dar te 'ong / de 
29b6(kha): skad bdud rjes 'khor la bstan/ nam gyi pbar byed tshur pbyed na/ bdud rje dmag dang chas nas su / gshen yul 'ol mo lung rang du/ dngos grub rtsi shing gcod du phyin/ gshen yul 
30a1(kha): 'ol mo lu ring gi/ dngos grub rtsi hing m cshod par/ ston pa gshen rab ma bo ya/ thugs rje sprul pa'i byin rlabs kyis/ rtsi shing gseb nas mie byung pa/ me pung 
30a2(kha): dmar po'i 'od zer gyis/ bdud kyi dmag tshogs g.yul bzlog nas/ bdud khams zhugs kyis de'u tshegs tsam/ gzhin yul 'ol mo lung ring gi/ dngos grub rtsi shing bregs pa / 
30a3(kha): bas/ zhe sdang bdud kyi dmag tshogs kyis/ phyogs su nye yang ma nus so// bdud rje khyab pa lag ring de/ shin tu yi mug ga chad nas/ bdud yul mun pa'i gling du phyin/ mya ngan 
30a4(kha): khang pa nang du zhugs/ yugs kyi zhags pa thoMd du bcings/ re ba nag po'i gocig gon/ yang bdud kyi ma sring mang po 'dus/ ma yis bu la smras pa'i mod/ bdud rje khyab pa lag rang 
30a5(kha): lags/ mya ngan khang pa'i nang nas byung / sdug pa'i mya ngan chas rnams bor/ gnhen rab mi bo ma thub par/ mya ngan rgyun du ma byed dang / pham rgyal bya ba kun la 'byung / thags 
30a6(kha): mkhar sgo brgya' nang du 'dang / bdud kyi nang 'khor 'bum sde gsum/ 'bum sde gcig gis phyi nang 'tshel/ 'bum sde gcig gis bar du bshal/ 'bum sde gcig gis nang nas 
30b1(kha): 'dren/ gshen rab mi bo ma thub pas/ bdud kyi chu bzhi skam snyam nas/ bdud kyi chu bzhi ma skam par/ da rung skye 'khor bye ba 'khor/ bdud kyi 'khor ba 'bum ste gsum/ gsod 
30b2(kha): bsha' za dang gsum po la/ sngana bas su bung rgyu med/ bdud rje khyab pa yar bzhes dang / mya ngan ma mdzad sems bskyed dang / 'khrug pa sam rgyal ram gyis 'ong / gzen rab 
30b3(kha): pham nas thub kyang sred/ da rang csho 'phrul bstan thabs yod/ mas bu la de skad smras so// bdud rje khyab pa lag ring gis/ ma la pbyir la lan btab pa/ 'jig rten khams kyi 
30b4(kha): sems can la/ 'o skol bdud las kha drag med/ 'o skol bdud kyi nang rigs la/ khyab pa nga las dbang che med/ bdud rje khyab pa lag ringngas/ sems can yongs la dbang bsgyur 
30b5(kha): nas/ dus la rgyug log 'di ltar byung / nga yi gong na dbang che ba/ s+dzun tshig mkhan gyi gnhen rab 'dis/ sems can dbang du 'dis bsdus pas/ ngala dbang rgyu ci yang med/ sprul 
30b6(kha): pa ci byas yo ka rtugs/ gshen rab 'di la dgrur gnad pa/ da lta nga la ga na yod/ mya ngan ci ste mi bgyi lags/ sdug pa'i mya ngan khang pa nas/ da lta ngan bu mi 'byung ngo // 'di / 
31a1(kha): / y/ ye thub thabs ma la ji lta bu mnga'/ tshoe 'bhrul 'is pas skyon can 'di mi thub/ tshoe 'phrul bstan thabs ma yis gsung pa ma la ji lta bu mnga'/ mya ngan khang pa 
31a2(kha): nang nas byung nas/ gzhen dang 'thab tu 'gro/ gnhen rab mathub bar du ngan bu ma 'byungngo// de skad ces bdud rje khyab pa lag rang gis/ ma sren thun dang ma mo la smras pas/ yang 
31a3(kha): mas bu la phyir smras pa/ gnhen la cho 'drul mi ston par/ mya ngan khang pa nag po nas/ bdud rje khyab pa mi 'byung na/ gnhyen la csho 'phrul bstan thabs bstan/ gnhen rab 
31a4(kha): mi bo ma thub kyang / bstan pa bshegs kyin dmag thabs yod/ gnas pa'i mkhar la cho 'bhrul ston/ bdud kyi 'dzir tho mang pos brkos/ bar po so brgyad rming nas bshig/ 
31a5(kha): gnen rab rnten pa'i mkhar med na/ mya ngan gling nas 'das te 'gro/ bstan pa thub pa de yin no// nam gyi pbar byed tshul byed na/ shin tu gzabs nas ma byas na/ gnhen rab 
31a6(kha): sprul pas tsher bar 'ong / bdud rje nyid kyang brlag par srid/ shin tu gzab pa'i rigs yin no// de skad ces mas bu la smras so// bdud rje khyab pa lag ring des/ mya ngan khang pa nang 
31b1(kha): nas byung / nyon mongs bdud dmag mang po bsgrugs/ ya ki sgra lo phyar phyur nas/ ba spu'i bu ga yan chod kyi/ sprul pa'i bdud dmag rgya re spul/ bdud kyi tho chen 'dzir chen 
31b2(kha): gnyis/ bdud dmag lag tu ra re bskur/ dmag la gdam ngag smras pa'i md/ bdud kyi dmag tshogs mang po kun/ gnhen rab mi bo nyal ba'i mkhar/ bar po sa brgyad rin chen 
31b3(kha): mkhar/ tho chen 'dzor chen rnon po yis/ rmeng nas bus la bskyel la thongs/ sprul pa can zhig yin kyang ni/ gnhen rab ryud nas 'chi yang srid/ brgya la sprul pas mzhi / 
31b4(kha): yang / rten gyi chags pa'i mkhar med na/ gshen rab mya ngan 'das te 'gro/ bstan pa nub pa de yin no// de skad bdud rjes 'khor la bstan/ nam gyi par pbyed tshur byed na/ 
31b5(kha): bdud rje dmag dang chas nas ni/ bar po sa brgyad rtsa ru phyin/ bar po sa brgyad ma zshig par/ ston pa gnhen rab mo bo yis/ thugs rje sprul pa'i byin rlabs kyis/ mkhar gyi nang / 
31b6(kha): nas chu byung pas/ chu bo rgyun gyis rba drag gis/ bdud kyi dmag tshogs g.yul bzlog nas/ bdud khams rba la de'u g.yeng tsam/ gshen mkhar bar po so brgyad ni/ rmeng nas rko / 
32a1(kha): bar ma 'grub kyis/ nhe sdang bd kyi dbag tshigs kyis/ cing la rig kyang ma nus so// bdu rje khyab pa lag ring // shen tu yi mug g chad d// bdu yul mun pa'i / 
32a2(kha): glang du phyin/ mya ngan khang pa'i nang du zhugs/ yugs kyi zhags pa thoMd du bcings/ re ba nag po'i gocig gon/ gnhen kyi bstan pa ma bslrabs pas/ mya ngan gdung nas byed kyin 
32a3(kha): 'dug/ yang bdud kyi ma sring mang po 'dus/ ma yis ba la smras pa'i mod/ bdud rje khyab pa lag rang lags/ mya ngan khang pa nang nas byung / sdug pa'i mya ngan chas rnams bor// 
32a4(kha): gshen rab mi bo ma thub pas/ mya ngan rgyun du ma byed dang / pham rgyal bya ba kun la 'byung / lthags mkhar sgo brgya' nang nas byon/ bdud kyi nang 'khor 'bum sde gsum/ 
32a5(kha): 'bum sde gcig gis phyi nas tshel/ 'bum sde gcig gis bar du bshal/ 'bum sde gcig gis nang du 'dren/ gnhen rab mi bos ma thub pas/ bdud kyi chu bzhi skam snyam pas/ 
32a6(kha): bdud kyi chu bzhi ma skam par/ da rung skye 'khor byed pa mang / bdud kyi 'khor ba 'bum sde gsum/ gsod bsha' za dang gsum pa la/ snga na bas su nyung rgyu med/ bdud rje khyab pa yar / 
32b1(kha): bzhengs dang / mya ngan ma mdzad sems bskyed dang / 'khrug pa pham rgyal rim gyis 'ong / gnhen rab tsam nas thub kyang srid/ da rung tsho 'bhrul bstan thabs yod/ ma yis bu la de / 
32b2(kha): skad ces smras so// bdu rje khyab pa lagring gis ma la pbyer lan btab pa/ 'jig rten khams kyi sems can la/ 'o skol bdud las kha drag med// 'o skol bdud kyi na rigs 
32b3(kha): la/ khyab pas las dbang che med/ bdud rje khyab pa lag ring ngas/ sems can yongs la dbang bsgyur na/ dus la rgyu log 'di lta byung / nga'i gong na dbang che ba/ s+dzun tshig mkhan gyi 
32b4(kha): gshen rab 'dis/ sems can dbang du kun ka bsdus/ ngala dbang rgyu ci yang med/ sprul pa ci byas yo ka rugs/ gnhen rab 'di las dgrar gnad pa/ da lta nga la dbang yang med/ 
32b5(kha): mya ngan ci ste mi bgyid lags/ sdug pa'i mya ngan khang pa nas/ da lta ngan bu mi 'byungngo // 'di la thub thabs ma la ci lta bu mnga'/ cho 'bhrul 'os pas skyon can 'di mi thub/ 
32b6(kha): cho 'phul bstan thabs mnga' ba gsungs pa ma la ci lta bu mnga'/ bdag mya ngan khang pa nang nas 'byung na/ ghen dang 'thab tu 'gro/ gnhen rab ma thub bar du ngan bu mi 'byung ngo // 
33a1(kha): de skad ces bdu khyab pa lag reing gis/ ma reng thun btang ma mo la smras 'o// de la mas kbyir smras pa/ ghen la tsho 'drul mi ston par/ mya ngan khang pa nag po / 
33a2(kha): nas/ bdu rje khyab pa mi 'byung na/ gnhen la tsho 'bhrul bstan thabs bstan/ gnhen rab mo tso mathub kyang / bstan pa bshegs cing dma' thabs yo// bdud rje khyab pa lag 
33a3(kha): rang lags/ tsho 'bhrul nar rtugs tsam na/ yi mug byed kyin mya ngan byed/ sdrug pa'i khang pa nag por 'jug/ thug pas gnhen rab ga na thub/ sna re rugs kyang na re rgol/ 
33a4(kha): gshen dang 'thab zla byed pa yang / snying sdes sngan sran che bar gar 'ong dgos/ gnhen la cho 'phrul grangs med ston/ bu dang chung ma bu mo dang / nor dang slob bu tshun chad la/ cho 
33a5(kha): / 'drul tshugs tshad yo la ston/ ces kyang yo yis mtshugs na/ nag po bdu kyi bstan pa 'i/ ces kyang thub tu tho ba yin/ gzhen rab mtho' bstan pa 'd/ ces kyang dang du 
33a6(kha): tho ba yin/ sems la 'gyod pa ye med do// rang cag bdud kyi sde rnams kyang / gshen rab 'khor pa byas la 'dang / de skad ma yis bu la bstan/ bdud rje khyab pa lag ring yang / ma

58a5(kha): ni 'di ltar ro// 'khor ba'i sems can thams cad ni/ rgyu dug lnga'i dbang gis 'khor ba'i gnas lngar skye ste rgyun bcad pa'i phyir/ ston pa'i thugs rjes bon sgo bzhi mdzod dang lnga 
58a6(kha): bstan/ con sgo re re nas mchod pa rnam pa lnga la byung ste/ cbon dpon gss kyi nang nas/ zhe sdang byams pa la mchod pa dang gcig/ 'dod chags sbyin pa la mchod pa dang gnyis/ 
58b1(kha): gti mug ye zhes la mchod pa dang gsum/ phrag dog yangs pa la mchod pa dang bzhi/ nga rgyal zhi ba la mchod pa dang lnga'o// bon chab dkar gyi nang na/ byin gyis rlabs kyin skye 
58b2(kha): b rnam bzhi bsgral la mchod pa dang gcig/ thugs rje'i stobs kyi 'khor ba'i lam lnga bcad la mchod pa dang gnyis/ sngags kyi bathu yais nyon mongs pa'i bag chags sbyangs la / 
58b3(kha): mtchod pa dang gsum/ phyag rgya'i dbang gis ma dang lha yi go 'sa du tshogs bskyed la mchod pa dang ban/ tingng 'dzin gyi rtsal gyis yi shes kyi glong du bzhag la mtchod pa dang lnga'o// 
58b4(kha): bon chab nag gi nang nas/ lus gus pa'i mchod pa dang gcig/ ngag snyan pa'i mchod pa dang gnyis/ yid dad pa'i mchod pa dang gsum/ zas gtsang ma'i mchod pa dang bzhi/ s+dzas 
58b5(kha): mdzes pa'i mchod pa dang lnga'o// tbon 'phan yul gyi nang nas/ mar me mdangs gsal gyi mchod pa dang gcig/ sbyar songs re gda'i mcshod pa dang gnyis/ rtsi sman ro mchog gi 
58b6(kha): mchod pa dang gsum/ lha sangs zhal zas kyi mchod pa dang bzhi/ me tog mdzes ldan gyi mchod pa dang lnga'o// bon gtsang ma mtho tshog spyi rgyug gi nang nas/ sku'i mchod pa phyag 
59a1(kha): rgyadang gcig/ gsung gi mtchod pa nying po dang gnyins/ thugs kyi mchod pa tingng 'dzin dang gsum/ yoMn tan gyi mchod pa s byad dang bni/ 'pren las kyi mtshod pa / 
59a2(kha): tshig bshad dang lnga'o// de rnams khyed la bshad pa yang / sems can don du phye ba las/ nges pa'i don dam rtogs tsam na/ gcig gi nang na gcig tshangngo// s+dzas la brten pa'i dge 
59a3(kha): byin/ sgrib pa byang ba'i rgyur bstan no// ne'u chung shes rab rtsal dang phyir/ gang 'khor gcig gi mchod pa brul/ sdeg srib 'byang par don nges so// de skad ces gnhen rab kyis 
59a4(kha): bka' bstsal bas/ yang gnhen za ne'u chung gis gsol ba/ sdig pa'i las la 'phreg tsam med/ dge ba'i las la thang chod pas/ dngos med sems la rig pa shar/ sgo bzhi 
59a5(kha): bon mchod bstan pa rnams/ blo rab ting 'dzin mchod par dga'/ kho mongs kyi srgo ma tshogs/ 'phan yul rgyas pa'i mchod pa lnga/ lha ghen sred pa bder gshegs la/ rang yang /

59b1(kha): bkrus/ rgyan dang la dugs mdzes par byas/ gsa mcma sham po lha rtsi'i rgo/ bder gshegs lha gnen red pala/ lusngag brdud de mtshod pa dbal/ de'o cho de'dus ni
59b2(kha): gsal ba'i gnhyen bza' nhe'u chung mas/ bsam pa bzang po thang tshod pas/ gnhen rab thugs rje'i byin rlabs kyis/ me long g.ya' dag bzhin du gsal/ mchod pa rnam lnga /

59b4(kha): 'dzin gyis bzung nas mchod pa dbul lo// snod rnam par dag pa/ phye 'byung ba rnam bzhi ren po che'i gzhal yas khang du ting nge 'dzin gyis bzung / bcud rnam par dag pa/ nang 
59b5(kha): khams gsum sems can/ lha dang lha mo'i sku ru ting nge 'dzin gyis bzung / s+dzas rnam par dag pa/ mchod dang sbyen pa gnyis 'dod pa'i yon tan lngar gyur par/ ting nge 'dzin gyis 
59b6(kha): bzung / bdag rnam par dag pa/ lha'i sku zhel sgong pyes pa 'dra bsri med 'od zer 'phro ba gcig tu ting nge 'dzin gyis bzung / mgron rnam par dag pa/ sdzas ci 'dod yid bzhin 
60a1(kha): 'phrad kyen dgos 'di re bskong par ting nge 'dzin gyis bzung / bder gzegs rnam par dag pa/ sku bzhi mdzes pa'i zhal bzhi shin tu grangs mang pa kun la gnas par 
60a2(kha): ting nge 'dzin gyis bzung no // de nas zhes rig gsal ba'i na'u chung mas ting nge 'dzin dang ma bral bar/ mnyam pa'i phyag rgya sbyes nas su / ra ghang la sogs sgra rnams byung /

60a5(kha): byin rlabs char pa 'gro ba yongs la babs/ dbyed gsum sdzeng bu las 'phro can la 'khyil/ sa gzhi skom pa'i dad pa can rnams shang / yon tan 'bru bcud sbyin pa can gyis / 
60a6(kha): brgas/ de ltar tshangs pa'i gtsang sdzas bdud rtsi' gtsang chu 'di/ dang gi gzhal yas gnas mchog dang / rgyu sbyor yon bdag gnhen mched dang / mchod sbyin sdzas su bsngos pa rnams/

60b4(kha): kyi yum dang ye shes lha/ thabs kyi mchog dang shes rab sul/ bdag dang mtha' yas sems can gyi/ nyon mongs bag chags sdig sgrib rnams/ thugs rje thabs kyis sbyang ba'i

60b6(kha): rtsa bzhi la/ bdag dang mtha' yas sems can rnams/ nyon mongs sdig sgrib sbyang ba'i phyir/ lus ngag yid gsum thang bcad nas/ dang ba'i sems kyis phyag 'tshal lo// nyon / 
61a1(kha): mongs sdig sgrib byang gyur cig/ gzhen bza' ne' chung mas de skad brjod cing / bder gshegs sting rtsa bzhi'i mtshan la phyag 'tshal lo// de nas yang gzhen bza' 
61a2(kha): ne'u chung mas/ lha gnhen srid pa mchod pa rnam lnga raim pas bul te/ dang la mar me thal mo sbyar ba'i bar du bzug nas/ gam po lha rtsi'i shar phyogs nas mdangs byung / ngag 
61a3(kha): bsgrags lus btud/ tshig bshad 'di skad brjod/ ngo m tsar rmad du byung ba yi/ gsal ba 'od kyi mar me 'd/ dang po ye med stong pa la/ srid ni ye yod chung tsam srid/ chags ni sra

62a1(kha): / #/ yid gsum dad pa yis/ mar me mchod pa phrul ba yis/ grub pa gnhen gyi gnas mchog khyad par can/ gar gsas btsan po bzhugs pa'i spyan lam du/ shes

92a1(kha): ston pas bka' brtsal p/ bd kyi bar chad med na ghen rab yi mi 'byung / 'khor ba ging du sting na sems can thad kyang zen/ 'di la brgyal rgyen mya gan byed pa

96b1(kha): 'jig ka ma zhig yin no// rgyal po de ni shin tu yang sod che la/ dge la dad pa zhig yin no// sngon tshe grangs med pa'i dus nas kyang / dge ba gcig du spyod pa zhig yin pas/
