100a4(kha): nas sbyin pa snyoms par bkye/ sbyin pa gtong pa'i dus la bab pa yin/ dge ba'i stobs mchog de las che ba med/ 'bum sde mang po'i mi yi srog kyang thon/ sbyin pa btang nas mi 
100a5(kha): rnams gyis khar dge ba'i sdim khrims phog/ gyes pa'i nying la sprang po gcig ni bslabs/ bltas pas ha zan rus 'go phyir byung gcig/ chu grang por gang blud nas smrar bcug pa/ 
100a6(kha): g.sung drung bon po dad pa'i sems ldan khyod/ sbyin pa rgya che yongs la gting sgra khums/ sprang po bza' dgu brgyugs pas lam du snad brgyad lus lags/ skyes mchog thugs rjes / 
100b1(kha): 'di rnams mai bzungngam/ sprang pos de skad bzlas pas/ dad pa can gyi sems la snying rje skyes/ sprang po khred nas brgyugs pas/ lam ka'i rhi rtsa na/ shin tu nyam thag sprang mo thad 
100b2(kha): brgyad nang / gso ba'i zas ni cang stong las ma rnyed/ bslangs nas khred pas lam du 'gyel gyin song / de la sprang poMs smras pa/ sbyin pa btang ba'i mtha' ni mthar pbyin chags med 
100b3(kha): yin/ g.yung drung bon po sems dpa' chen po khyod/ lus las na tchod khrag pyungs nga yi bu snad gsos/ skyes bu'i bsam pas snying rje'i sems bskyed nas/ 'di la na khrag sbyin par 
100b4(kha): ma btang na/ sbyin pa'i pha rol tu phyin pa ma yin pas/ sha rnag khrag pbyung sprang po bza' dgu gsos/ rus pa dkar la thug nas skye ba brjes/ mi mdzhed 'jig rten ye sangs bar 
100b5(kha): lhar skyes/ sprang po rnams kyang bder gshegs sprul pa'o// der sprang po bza' dgu lang nas gzung gi dung du kha dmar thag gir phyin/ dal 'byor skyes kyis gsung pa/ ngayi gcen po 
100b6(kha): gang du song / khyed rnams kha dmar ba ci zos gsungs pas/ sprang pos lan btab pa/ de rnams lcogs nas smad brgyad chad/ khyed kyi spyan sngar 'ong ma nus/ sun ma'i bon pos snying 
101a1(kha): je byas/ tshe bdag bcad de lakbyen/ rlus la thug nas kho bdag grongs/ cen po de'i sgazes pas/ da lta 'grangs nas 'ong pa yin/ tha dmar ba yang de lhar yin/ 
101a2(kha): de skad ces sprang pos smras pas/ khra bo rgod ni gsod du song / de la khu bos brtson 'grus bskyed/ sprang po bza' dgu ma bsad skyabs/ khu bo skyes mchog dad ldan gyis/ gcen / 
101a3(kha): nas srog gis gseMs pa'i bu / ' bu ma rig phyogs can gyis/ bsad nazhin tu ga na rung gsungs nas/ brag gi gnas su gser khrid nas/ sprang po gar song cha yang med/ khu bos 
101a4(kha): bder gshegs sprul par rig/ dge bzhin tu thang bcad bsgoms/ thang ma gsal de la dad pa skyes nas/ skud po la smras pa/ khyad par can gyi skyes mchog mched/ lus srog 
101a5(kha): gnyis kyang pbyin par btang / pu bo zas pa'i sprang po dgu/ gso yin gsungs nas gnas su khrid/ 'o cag phye ma snying ro rje/ las la dge sdig yod par nges/ gnas la skyed sdug yod 
101a6(kha): par nges/ rgyal srid zas nor sbyin par btang / rang cag ma smad kyang dge ba bya/ zhes smras nas/ zas nor thams cad sbyin par btang / g.yung drung bon la thang bcad nas/ dgon pa'i 
101b1(kha): gnas su ma smad gsum gyis kyang bsgoms so// 'khor rnams sngon gyi rgyu 'bras de ltar yin/ da lta go bar nges bstan nas/ sngon 'og phyogs kyi 'jig rten de na/ dga' ba rgyas 
101b2(kha): dang / shes rab ldan dang / dal 'byor skyes dang gsum ni/ sgom pa mtsil du hab pa dang / byin pa rag po'i yon tan gyis/ 'g tsan gnas 'dir dag pa/ gsgal ba/ shes rab 
101b3(kha): gsum du skyes/ der gto bu 'bum khri klog gi lce can gyis/ shes bya'i sgrib pa sbyangs / sngon gyi dga' ba rgyas ni/ da lta 'das pa'i ston pa gto rgyal yi mkhyen nyid do// sngon gyi 
101b4(kha): shes rab ldan ni/ da lta'i ston pa ghen rab bdag nyid do// sngon gyi dal 'byor ldan ni/ da lta ni sud kyi ston pa ye nas srid bu chung yin no// phyi nas dal 'byor skyes tshe 'phos 
101b5(kha): nas/ da lta khye' shes pa bya ba 'og min gyi gnas/ mgon btsun phya'i grong khyer na shes bya'i sgrib pa sbyong gan da lha yod d// sngon gyi rdul zhugs can ni/ da lta bdu khyab pa nyid 
101b6(kha): yin no// sngon gyi bhang ma gsal ni da lha ni/ ne'u chung sman nyid do// sngon gyi khra bo rgod ni/ da lha'i stag bu thung nyid do// sngon gyi khra mo gsal ni/ da lha'i gzig bu thung nyid do// 
102a1(kha): / y/ sems can las kyi 'khor ba'i rgyu 'bras mang po bstan mi lang no // zhu ba po rnams dad pa mi bzlog pa'i phyir bdud gzhen rgyu 'bras 'is tsam bstan pa'o// gnhen 
102a2(kha): rab kyi nor la bdud kyis cho 'bhrul bstan pa'i le'u ste bcu gnyis pa'o// // g.sung rung lha'i skad du na/ mu phya ha leng sangs te spa/ gang zag mi'i skad du na/ gnhen rab kyi bstan 
102a3(kha): pa rnam gsum rjes su bzhag pa'i le'u 'o// de'i tshe de'i dus na/ ston pa gnhen rab mi bo nai/ gnas mchog dam pa 'ol mo lung ring na bzhugs nas/ 'gro ba sems can mang 
102a4(kha): po bkrid cing sdrang pa'i phyir/ zhal nas gsung drung 'brul ngag bden pa'i bon bston to// da ni sems can sgrib byang tshogs s+dzogs zhin tu nyung ba de/ ston pazhin tu shes rab chen po 
102a5(kha): mnga' bas mkhyen/ 'khor rnams kun la zhal nas gsungs pa'i mo// dngos po dngos med btsal ba dang / mtshan mas don la mtshen pa'i phyir/ sems can rnams kyi don ched du / 
102a6(kha): bstan pa rnam gsum rjes bzhag ran/ bstan pa thub pa'i sems can gcig/ mi mdzed 'jig rten lho phyogs par 'das na/ rgyal po gsal mchog dam pa bya ba zhig/ 
102b1(kha): shin tu dge ba che la bon gyi 'khor lo rgyun du skor ba zhig/ gnas de las tshe 'phos la khad pas/ tshe 'phos ma thag tu ' bu'i 'jig rten 'di' tnub phyogs kyi rgyal po'i ka / 
102b2(kha): 'da' la gser gyi mdog can gyi bur skyes/ skyes nas dge ba'i hugs kyis/ shin tu bsod nams che ste 'ong / de la bstan pa bzhag pa'i sa yin no// de'i gong du sems can 
102b3(kha): grangs mang yang / bstan pa bzhag pa'i sa ni gang yang med/ so s kun nas byang chub sems bskyed pa/ dge la tang bcad brtson na bdud kyang rugs par 'gyur/ de skad cis ston pas 
102b4(kha): bka' b rtsal pas/ shes rab blo dang ldan pa'i 'gyur ba blo gsal gyis/ skong bza' khri lam mtshan btags smon lam yongs su btab/ nam zhig 'khor ba song gin khyim pa 
102b5(kha): sdun dbyung phyir/ gzhan pas khyim la dad kyin lan gcig chags tshul bstan pa'i phyir/ khri lam khab tu bzhes nas spul pa'i sras/ gsal ba'i mdog can gnhen bu song tshag
102b6(kha): 'khrungs/ 'khrungs pa'i dus der/ gto bu dpyad bu 'khrungs pa bzhin/ bkur sti ram 'gro kun gyis lugs bzhin byas/ dus der g.yung dung sems dpa' dang ldan pa thams cad kyang 
103a1(kha): }/ 'drul g bden pa' khon bshin tu nyan/ nyan pa ma o bye ba'i ltsam la/ gshen rab nal nas ng 'don bstan cin bzlug 'o// de'i cho de' dang na/ srul / 
103a2(kha): rgya lag 'odi ma'i gling / mkhar khri sgo rtse brgya'i gling / grong khyer 'dul sgyur bskod pa'i mchog/ de la pba ni rgyal po ka 'da' la gser gyi mdog can zhes bya'o// ma ni btsun 
103a3(kha): mi mu dri la gsal 'di ma zhes bya'o// dkor nor ni rgyal srid ren po che la sogs te/ 'jig rten gyi ma 'gyur pa las che'// bu dang sras mi mnga' na/ dus der mi mdzed kyi 
103a4(kha): 'jig rten par 'das pa'i lho phyogs na/ rgyal po gsal mchog dam pa bya ba de/ der che 'phos nas/ bsod nams kyi hugs kyis yul rgya lag 'odi ma'i gling gi rgyal po ka 
103a5(kha): 'da' la gser gyi mdog can gyi bur skyes/ skyes pa'i dus der yul de na gnas pa'i mi rnams kyang zhin tu spro ba skyes nas/ smon lam btab cing mtshan brtags pas/ rgyal bu / 
103a6(kha): de ni shin tu phyi'i mtshan bzang pa/ skra g.yu'i mdog 'dra ba/ seMn mo ni bse'i mdog 'dra ba/ so dung so 'khor bar 'dug pa/ mgo zhal gyi bum pa dmu lugs su 'dug pa/ sgal 
103b1(kha): pa mkhar med dung gi drang shing du 'dug pa/ rtsib ma go med rin po che'i gur du 'dug pa/ yan lag lhu med gser gyi shar shad du 'dug pa/ mig la bkrag chags me tog u dum / 
103b2(kha): 'bar ba 'dra ba/ sna la 'od gsal me tog lug chos 'dra ba/ snying ka na pad ma 'dab brgyad yod pa/ rna ba la bgrag gsal me togsang rgyan 'dra ba/ lte ba la mtshan ldan 
103b3(kha): g.yung drung 'khor bar chags pa/ rkang pa'i mthil na dbang sgyur 'khor lo rtsibs brgyad bris pa/ gsang ba'i skyed shing rin po che'i rdo rje 'dra ba/ lag pa g.yas g.yon gyi mthil la 
103b4(kha): shing rtsi 'phrul gyi yi ge sum cu rgyal rtags su 'khor bar bris nas chags pa/ de la yab kyang shin tu spro ba skyes nas mtshan gsol ba ni/ rgyal po'i rgya yi rigs la// 
103b5(kha): 'phrul gyi yi ge kong ce sum cu 'khor bar bris pas/ rgya kong tsi 'phrul gyi rgyal po mang du btags so// lhas mkhan thams cad kyis kha mar smras pa/ rgya kong tse 'drul gyi rgyal / 
103b6(kha): bu 'di/ sngon yang bzod thob sku la da lha mtshan yang bzang / sngon yang sbyin btang da lha yo byad phun sum tshogs/ sngon yang dbang mnos da lha dbang chen rgyal bur skyes/ da yang 'di / 
104a1(kha): / y/ yi rang la bsod nams dar gyin dge ba 'phel te 'ong bar nges so// ces kha mar bzang po btags so// de nas rgyal bu de gzhan dang khyad par yod pa bzhin bzang / smra / 
104a2(kha): mkhas/ ngagsnyan/ shes rab che/ dbang po gsgal gyin bag dang rab tu ldan no// de nas rgyal bu de dgung lo dgu len nas/ dbyed zlar ba'i nya yi nyen par nyi mhar ba'i zer la / 
104a3(kha): me tog sna tshogs pul nas/ smon lam btab ste/ mi 'gyur ba dbyings kyi yum s srig er sangs la gus pas phyag 'tshal lo// ye shes lha'i sku gnhen lha 'di dkar la 
104a4(kha): gus pas phyag 'tshal lo// thabs la mkhas pa'i mchog srid pa sangs po 'bum khri la gus pas phyag 'tshal lo// shes rab phrul du phyin pa ston pa gshen rab la gus pas 
104a5(kha): phyag 'tshal lo// bdag kyang sngon gyi zhugs bzang gtsang ma mi lus thobda lta gnas bzang 'dzam gling sog kar skyes/ las kyi skal bzang gsung dung bon la spyod/ rigs dang 
104a6(kha): khrungs btsun dbang chen rgyal por smin/ da yang bdag lo nyi shu rtsa lnga len tsam na/ bu khe'u gsum bu mo gnyis te lnga/ bu yi skal pa skye bar shig cig/ 'bras khal lnga brgya 
104b1(kha): 'ol mo'i 'tshi zhing la zas kyi skal par skye bar shig/ khri dkar stong nag brgya dmar nor gyi skal par yod par shig cig/ gnyan lam 'di ma gsal griogs kyi skal pa yod par / 
104b2(kha): hig cig/ rgyal bus de skad smras nas thon lam drag po btab/ thon lam drag po mba thu yais sab kyis gntyan tham btsal/ rgyal po gtyan rigs bu mo gnyan lam dkar 
104b3(kha): mo 'di ma gsal/ rgyal bu gtan gyi khab tu btsun mor bzhes/ nye shu rtsa lnga lo tshegs sleb tsam na/ khe'u gsum bu mo gnyis kyang bu yi skal par smain/ zhing la zas kyi 
104b4(kha): skal par 'bras khal lnga brgya 'byung / lug khri gnag stong tya brgya zang zeng nor du 'tshogs/ sems can mi ye bu la bsod nams tshogs che ba/ rgyal po rgya rigs kong ci 
104b5(kha): 'pul gyi rgyal po yi/ bsam pa yid bzhin dus su khrigs kyis 'grub/ de la rgyal po nyid kyang yid dga' sems spro'o// yum mu tri gsal 'di mas sras kong tse la smras pa/ 
104b6(kha): rgyal bu khyod ni bsod nams tshogs can zhig/ kha nas ci smras smon lam 'grub par nges/ snga ma'i smon lam btab pa de yang smon lam rgya chung yang 'dug/ da ni shin tu 
105a1(kha): / thon lam rgya che bskyed dgos/ bu d zhor la tshig shes gana yod// bu brgya ba stying tsam du smon lam gdab/ nor gyi longs spyod yul thams cengs par gdab/ 
105a2(kha): rin chen sna lngas dkodr mdzod khengs par gdabbran dang gsog 'khor 'brum khrag mang po gab/ btsun mo mdzes ldan yid dang 'bhad dgur gdab/ rgyal bu lags de ltar bskyed / 
105a3(kha): la smon lam gdab 'tshal/ de skad ces yum gyis sras la smras so// sras kyis smras pa spyir yang khams gsum thams cad chags pas 'khor/ de'i nang nas 'dod pa'i 'dod 
105a4(kha): khams sdug bsngal zhin tu che/ de'i nang na bud med 'dod pa'i gzhi yin te/ 'dod pas thar pa thob mi srid/ chags pas khams gsum 'khor ba'i rgyu/ ma ngag yin yang gol bar 
105a5(kha): bcas/ bdag rang nyid kyang rgyu ma ha khrag lus/ sgyu ma yengs la zhig nas na khrag tul la lus/ sems nyid las kyis gcig du 'gro ba la/ sgyu ma'izhor la dad skyed don du ci 
105a6(kha): zhig bgyi/ snga ma'i smon lam nyid kyang gol nas da lta zhin tu 'gyod/ khyim thab dug gi 'dam s+dzab lags/ bu tsha thar pa'i gdes thag lags/ zang zing dmyal ba'i sa bon 
105b1(kha): lags/ nye gnas bdud kyi mya ngan lags/ tshig shes dam pa'i tshaMd cig ma zin na/ 'jig rten gser du song yang nims dus ga na 'ong / 'jig rten 'di ru btags chags 'di / 
105b2(kha): yais 'tshal/ slud ma'i rgyags gcig btsal thabs bsam pas 'gyed/ sras kyis yum la pbyir lan de skad btab g/ yum la sogs te 'khor mang po yang / gdam ngag de la 
105b3(kha): shin tu spro ba skyes/ de nas me la bsod nams che ba'i rkong tse 'phrul gyi rgyal po yis/ bsam pa bzang pos bsam pa la/ bdag yul khyad par du 'phags pa'i 'dzam gling sog 
105b4(kha): kar skyes/ skyes pa rnams las zhungs btsun zhing mchog gtsang ma'i mi lus rin po che ni thob/ de'i nang nas rigs che zhing khungs btsun pa dbang sgyur gyi rgyal po lta bur ni smin/ 
105b5(kha): 'jig rten gyi sgyu ma'i btags chags 'di la yang / lo nyishu rtsa lnga la bu khe'u gsum bu mo gnyis/ 'bras khal lnga brgya khri dkar stong gnag brgya dmar bsam pa yid 
105b6(kha): bzhin du 'grub/ da ni bdag sems can gyi bu yin pas/ 'jig rten 'di ni mi rtag pa nges/ 'dir ci yod ci byas kyang / sang nang bor ni 'chi bas/ she ba'i yul du rgyags cig 
106a1(kha): ma btag na/ 'jig rten 'di la ci yod phan pa med par dran nas/ 'che rgyags kyi dge rtsa zhig bya na/ me dang ma mnyam pa khyad par yod pa zhig bya bar bsam 
106a2(kha): nas/ lag pa'i gab to'i yig 'bru la gtsug lag brces pas/ rang gi bsod nams kyis dge ba ca byas kyang 'grub par mthongs// bsod nams che bas kca byas grub tyang la
106a3(kha): sems can gzhan dang mi mnyam khyad par zhugs pa'i phyir/ mu khyud rgya mtsho'i gling la gsas khang chen po gcig/ dge ba'i rtsa bar bzhengs par sems la mna' tho bcad/ 
106a4(kha): mis ni mkhar las mi btub rgya mtsho' nang du 'tchi/ lag pa'i gab rtsi'i yig 'bru yang brtsis nas/ srin po brgya dang sngon gyi las mthun pas/ mna' mtho bcad nas 
106a5(kha): brtsig na 'grub par shes/ de nas rgya kong tsi 'brul gyi rgyal po yang / yul mu ha la mun pa'i gling la srin po bsgrub tu pbyin no// lus dkyel mo dkrung du bcas/ phyag rgya 
106a6(kha): g.yon pa snying khar gtad/ g.yas pa'i sor mo lnga ka'i rtse mo lcags kyu bzhin du bkug/ srin po dbang du sdud pa'i snying po 'di skad bzlas te/ ya zhi bizhi ka ma la ka la ku la kha 
106b1(kha): la khu la khrug khrug yagah cad rgyud cis soMd rag byi thun thob yar ma sad/ de skad brgya rtsa brgyad bzlas pas/ srin po'i rgyal po ha rha la nag po zhes bya ba/ khro chu'i gzugs 
106b2(kha): la chu zheng gnyis kar 'dam dgu yod pa/ mig spral ba na brtsegs mar shar ba/ ral pa sprin nag nyil ba 'dra ba/ mchi ba gangs ri nyal ba 'dra ba/ lag pa dgu na su gri ka 
106b3(kha): ma smad dgu tsogs pa/ rkang pa dgu nas ba' thun skyogs 'phen pa/ pbag nag po mgo dgu zhon pa gcig mngon sum du yer ri byungngo // de'i kha nas ngala gnas su 'dug tu ma 
106b4(kha): ster bar srig gi rtsa ba nas 'dren pa/ khyod la ci byas ci byung / ngas nyes ci byas zer nas/ shin tu mi sdug khro tshul bstan nas thig du byung ngo // de la kong rtse 'phrul gyi rgyal po 
106b5(kha): yang / skye byung gi song nas zhin tu 'dzigs pa'i sems skyes so// bsod nams kyi lha bso zhes btab nas/ sdom byed kyi phyag rgya zhes bya ba/ g.yas pas khu tshur bcangs/ 
106b6(kha): g.yon pa snying khar bcangs pa'i steng du bzhag nas/ srin po dbang sdud 'ching byed kyi snying po bzlas te/ a ti sta sa la yangasu ru de sha la ma pag sa la/ gyur sur tra ni su ru hab de trang / 
107a1(kha): }/ par zhil tham ro le'a/ de skad ces lan gsum bzlas pas/ phyag rgya'i bus btha dng / sngags kyi bung stobs kyis/ drin pas bstas pas/ dtsi lta bu'i kong ba ma / 
107a2(kha): yin te/ phrag pa g.yas na gser gyi stag brgya mtchong / phrag pa g.yon na dung gi sang brgya mtshong / spyi bo'i gtsug nas lcags kyi khyung brgya 'dzum/ 'jigs pa'i skyes pa 
107a3(kha): brgya yis phyogs bzhir bskor nas byung par mthing / srin po zhin tu 'jigs nas 'bros kyang ma nus rang gis rings/ srin po dbang du 'dus nas su rking tse 'phrul gyi rgyal po la 
107a4(kha): gtsam bu'i tshig bshad bsdebs nas smras pa'i modo/ snga nas ma mthong pa'i skyes mchog khyad par can/ thun mong ma yin pa'i sku ni zhin tu brjoid/ gdug pa'i sems can sum 
107a5(kha): brgya' brgyan gyis brgyan/ 'jigs pa'i skyes pa brgya yis phyogs bzhir bskor/ rin chen srog dang ngan bu ma phral dang / phyi ma ci gsung khyod kyi bka' mi gcig/ srin gyi 
107a6(kha): rgyal pos de skad ces gsol to// de la kong ces lan btab pa/ bdag kyang 'jig rten mi'i longs spyod bsam pa 'grub/ sgyu ma'i ting 'dzin yin pas 'di nas mi rtag 'chi/ shi 
107b1(kha): ba'i rgyags shig 'di la bdag dgongs nas/ gzhan dang khyad par yod pa'i dge ba zhig/ rgya mtsho'i gling la gsas khang chen po zhig bzhengs pa'i/ mi yis mkhar las bya ru mi / 
107b2(kha): btub rgya mtsho' nang du 'tshi/ 'jig rten khams na rtsal dang s+dzu 'dhrul srin gyi rgyal po khyed che bas/ ngayi dge sding mkhar lan khyod kyis gyis/ rin chen srog dang mi dbral ba 
107b3(kha): ru bcad/ de skad ces kon ces smras pas/ de la yang srin gyis phyir smras pa/ s+dzu 'brul rtsal dang ldan pa'i bdag gi srin pdug brgya/ skyes bu dad pa skyes pa khyod kyi mkhar lan byed 
107b4(kha): du gtang / rtsal gyis ri khyag brag 'gem gangs 'drel mtsho yang skam/ zla ba gsum nas mkhar lan ci 'dod 'grub ste 'ong / kha dag cha byad nyid bzhin sprul la gtang / skong 
107b5(kha): ci nyid bzhin cha byad ma sul na/ srin gyi bu dang mi 'grogs nyams mi dga'/ dam la mi 'khyog drin gyi bna' ni/ gta s ra nan/ der kong bo nyid kyis sdom byed kyi phyag rgya / 
107b6(kha): bkrol nas/ srin po yang 'gro shes nas song ngo // skad cig ma bco lnga'i yun 'khor tsam ni/ srin gyis mna' ma zeos par/ kong co nyid kyang kho na 'dra ba brgya tham pa 'ong ngo // 
108a1(kha): de rnams kyis ko tse la phyag byas nas chad bskyar ba/ sprin gyi bu bya bzhi yangzhing ra 'byu ro// khyod mo' bu bya ba yang dar drags kyin skyo skyen no// las dge ba 
108a2(kha): bya bazhi spyad dka' zhing gnur lco'o// gsas khang gnyen po 'di ma tshar gyi bar du su la yang gtam mzhir ba 'ong ngo // zer nas srin gyis gtsigs su bzung ngo // meis kyang khas 
108a3(kha): / blangs nas srin po brgya dang 'grogs nas nam pbyed mtsho' 'gram du phyin/ mi'i srin la mkhar lan skos btab nas/ bon nyid mi 'byed mnyam pa'i don ched du/ phyi skor dpag 
108a4(kha): tshad lnga brgya yod pa'i zlum po gcig tu bskor/ zheng du dpag tshad brgya dang nyi shu rtsa lnga'o// rnams su rgya mtsho yi sngams la rags/ mtsh khar bhyin nas dpag tshad gcig 
108a5(kha): 'phags pa'i steng du/ thig mkhan ghen zhig spyan rangs tig btab la/ mznor ba ru gsas khang sdod cig bzhengs/ de ltar skong ces mkhar lan khog skos btab go// der srin 
108a6(kha): la zas su rgya mtsho'i kha zhag byin/ srin gyis na bun mun pa mtsho la gtibs nas/ mkhar lan sus kyang mi mthong pa ru byas/ s+dzu 'prul rtsal gyis re khur brag 'gems 
108b1(kha): nas/ rgya mtsho'i gting nas rtsal gyis rming btings nas/ tshad dang ldan pa zlam par mas yar brtsigs/ srin pos rgya mtsho yi gting du mkhar lan rming 'dings ba'i bar du/ shong /

141b6(kha): su 'tshogs/ lta ba'i lha thabs kun s+dzob bden pa ru/ phyi snod yid bzhin nor bu'i khang pa la/ nang bcud kun bzang bder gshegs yab yum mo// yas stags mang po chas pa'i 
142a1(kha): rgyan dang lta bran tham ral 'o// mpyod pa'i spyod thabs sems can nying rjes bzung / dben pa'i gnas 'o khro bs mtshams bcad la/ sku gsdum thags dang yon tan /

142b1(kha): go/ mtho tsag pyi rgyug con la khri sde gnyis su sangs pos glegs bam dkar la yi g nag tu bris/ phyi rabs sems can rnams la bstan pa'i rjes su bzhag/ de ltar 'gro ba /

142b5(kha): nam tig/ gang zag mi yi skad du na/ gnhen rab kyis 'phrin las bco brgyad kyi don bstan pa'i le'u 'o// de'i dus de'i che na/ 'bum sde sel bur mkhyen pa'i gto bu 'brum

143a1(kha): pas na brtan/ bad gnyan po lha yis btags pas na brjod/ nang +dzu 'bhrul klu yis bres pas na bra/ skos rgam po bya yis mdzad pas na legs/ lags bsod

157b6(kha): bas/ rin po che'i tog ye shes kyi lha gnhen lha 'di dkar dang sbyar ro// dbyings ye zhes mkha' la mnyam pa'i bar nas/ 'gro ba'i don du thabs dang shes rab zung du 'brel te bya ru 
158a1(kha): / hi/ g.yas pa thabs kyi mchog srid pa sangs po 'bum khri dang sbyar ro// bya ru g.yin pa shes rab kyi phrul ston pa gnhen rab mi bo dang sbyar ro// bya ru g.yas g.yin la dar / 
158a2(kha): gyi cod pan ni sku'i 'od zer dang sbyar ro// 'odi mtsho kha dog kun gyi gzhung dang mthun 'od rgyud gang ma gtogs pa rnams kyis brten/ 'od zer shing lo'i tshul du mdzes par spras so// 
158a3(kha): de rnams rgyan du khol mas thebs par gdab/ rdo rje gdan pa yan chad snod la thog pas/ ston pa'i thugs rje 'od zer byin rlabs kyis/ mi bde snod rnams zhi nas rin chen na 
158a4(kha): lnga'i g.yung drung gzha' chen 'od kyis bskor bar gsal/ snod dang 'brel ba'i rigs drug sems can rnams la phog pas/ ston pa'i thugs rje 'od zer byin rlabs kyis/ mi bde sdug 
158a5(kha): bsngal zhi nas lha dang lha bor byur/ sar la bsdus pas ye zhes tsen gang stong pa'i rang bzhin ni/ gtso ba 'khor dang mya ngan las 'das pa'i bon du 'dus/ de yang don du dbuns kyi blam 
158a6(kha): po'i don du 'dus/ zangs re dmar po rgyan dang bcas pa bzhag/ phyi ma thams cad gsas khang dkar nag bkra gsal ci bzhin du / phyogs bzhi kun nas nang du ting nge 'dzin gyis slong 
158b1(kha): la bsgom/ de ltar 'khor ba'i bon dang mya ngan las 'das pa'i bon/ ma rmongs sa le shes rab rtsal 'byongs kyis/ ting nge 'dzin gyi gzungs kyis ma yengs zin pa ni/ bdag dang /

158b6(kha): gtsang ma'i rgyan gzhi gnyis bting ste/ rgyan bzhi ya tha'i steng du gong gi le'u dgu par smon pa'i mchod pa'i yas stags rnams gsogs/ rgyan gzhi ma tha'i steng du sbyin pa'i yas 
159a1(kha): / t/ stags gsogs/ bar du mda' bzhi ral gri bzhi me long rgyal mtshan gtsang ma'i bum pa gsogs/ de gsum 'gab tu yin bdag thams cad thal mo sbyar la / 
159a2(kha): bsgrigs/ de nas dpon gsas kyi sta bon la gnas pa'i ram gro mnor bar mdzad de/ sta bon la gnas pa la yang don rnam pa lnga ste/ phyag rgyas sta bon la gnas pa dang / snying 
159a3(kha): pes sta bon la gnas pa dang / s+dzas kyi sta bon la gnas pa dang / tshig bshad kyi sta bon la gnas pa dang / ting nge 'dzin gyi sta bon la gnas pa dang lnga'o// de la phyag rgya'i sta bon 
159a4(kha): la gnas pa ni/ dbyings bdal mkhar khyab kyi phyag rgya yis bya ste/ g.yas pa'i phyag rgya thal mo spral bar gtad/ g.yon pa'i thal mo snying khar gtad/ de nas snying po'i sta bon / 
159a5(kha): la gnas pa ni/ A hi 'o mu leng lang spros pa 'di dpag mu rgyas bdal khyab gsal/ lan bzhi brjod/ de nas s+dzas kyi sta bon la gnas pazhi/ soMs kyi dud pa sprin du gtib
159a6(kha): mdzes pa'i psor ba gtsang ma ru/ gtsang chu byugs nas g.yas su bzung / mtshe 3ungs blugs nas g.yon du bzung / rin chen bum pa par du bzhag/ de nas tshig bshad kyi sta bon /

159b4(kha): bdag mtha' yas sems can mang po yis/ sgrib gnyis sbyang zhing tshogs gnyis bsags pa'i don slad du / mtshan ma s+dzas kyi rdul mtshon dkyil 'khor bris pa ru/ rang bzhin / 
159b5(kha): dkyil 'khor mkha' dbyings khyab bdal dag pa nas/ sems can don du byin gyis brlabs la byung pa yis/ lha mo nyes brgya lnga bcu 'khor dang bcas pa ni/ nangs par 'gro ba 
159b6(kha): sems can drang pa'i don sud du/ de moed ting 'dzin gsal ba'i dkyil 'khor dam pa ru/ 'gro ba'i don la ma yangs thugs dgongs las mdzad pas/ sku gsung thugs dang yon tan 
160a1(kha): 'phrin las lnga dang bcas/ byin gyis brlabs kyis thugs dag mkha' la gsal gdab nas/ 'khor bcas sta bon la ni bdal khyab bzhugs su gsol/ mi 'gyur

160a3(kha): med mtha' yas sems can kun la khyab/ ye shes lha chen gnhen lha 'di dkar thugs rje can/ sku mdog mi 'gyur dkar gsal shel gyi snying po 'dra/ rgyan dang cha lugs 
160a4(kha): sgel la shel gyi 'od kyis mdzes par brgyan/ rin chen bkra gsal stobs chen glang bsgol khri la bzhugs/ bdag dang yon bdag mtha' yas sems can mang po yi/ sgrib 
160a5(kha): gnyis sbyang zhing tshogs gnyis bsags pa'i don sud du/ mtshan ma s+dzas kyi rdul mtshon dkyil 'khor bris pa ra/ rang bzhin dkyil 'khor mkha' dbyings khyab bdal dag pa nas/ 
160a6(kha): sems can don du thugs rje las su bskyed pa yi/ lha chen gnyis brgya lnga bcu 'khor dang bcas pa ni/ nangs par 'gro ba sems can drang pa'i don slung du/ de mod ting 'dzin gsal 
160b1(kha): ba'i dkyil 'khor dam pa ra/ 'gro ba'i don la ma yangs thugs dgongs las mdzad pas/ sku gsung thugs dang yon tan 'phrin las lnga dang bcas/ thugs rjes bskyed nas thugs 
160b2(kha): dag mkha' la gsal btab nas/ 'khor bcas sta bon la ni khyab bdal bzhugs su gsol/ mi 'gyur dbyings chen 'byams yas bon gyi dbyings dkyel te/ rang bzhain dkyil 
160b3(kha): 'khor khyab bdal klong yangs dag pa nas/ 'gro ba'i don du 'od zer yig 'bu shin tu gsal/ thugs rje tshad med mtha' yas sems can kun la khyab/ thabs kyi mchog gyur 
160b4(kha): sangs po 'bum khri sprul pa can/ sku mdog mi 'gyur dkar 'bar ddul gyi snying po 'dra/ rgyan dang cha lugs ddul la ddul gyi 'od kyis brgyan/ rin chen bkra gsal rlabs chen / 
160b5(kha): khyung bsgol khri la bzhugs/ bdag dang yon bdag mtha' yas sems can mang po yi/ shrib gnyis sbyong zhing tshogs gnyis bsags pa'i don sun du/ mtshan ma s+dzas kyi rdul 
160b6(kha): mtshon dkyil 'khor bris pa ru/ rang bzhin dkyil 'khor mkha' dbyings khyab bdal dam pa nas/ sems can don du sprul pa las su srid pa yi/ srid pa gnyis brgya lnga bcu 'khor / 
161a1(kha): dang bcas pa zni/ nangs par 'gro bsems kcan drang pa'i don sang du/ de od teng 'dzin gsal ba'i dkyil 'khor dam par/ 'gro ba'i don la ma ying thags dgongs

161a5(kha): rgyan dang cha lugs rin chen nyid la nyid kyis brgyan/ ren chen bra gsal dbang brgyur 'khor lo'i khre la bzugs/ bdag dang yon bdag mtha' yas sems can mang po sa/

161b5(kha): yang snying po gcig la/ ha 'a hUM 'i lam lam/ de nas yang gong ltar mtshungs par togs bcu bum par blugs/ de ni thabs dang shes rabzungdu 'brel ba'i snying po'// yang snying po /

166a1(kha): / 'dul ba'i phyir/ dbang por bcas pa'i sprul sku mtha' yas bkyi/ gang dang mthun par mdzad pa'i sku gzugs dang / sprul pa'i sku dang dbyer med sku gdung rnams/ bder / 
166a2(kha): gzhigs mtchod pa'i rten du dus mthar bzugs su gsol/ de nas ting ng 'dzin gyis rgyan bkad pa ni/ stong gsum gyi stong yid 'ang lha'i gzhal yas chang du gyur pa dang / rgyan na / 
166a3(kha): tshigs me tog gi gling am/ ren po che' gsung run dang / gna' tshen 'd du lam gyis song par bsam/ gsung rab sku gdang / sku gzugs gsum/ gcig gis gcig bskyed sku 
166a4(kha): gsung rten du dgod pa dang / rdul tshen la sogs sku gsum mchod pa dang / sems can sgrib sbyang tshogs s+dzogs bsags pa'i phyir/ rgyan dgod pa'i don bstan pa'o// de nas yang 
166a5(kha): dpon gsas mnga' bdag gis rgyan dgod pa'i steng du/ bder gzhegs sku gsum spyan drangs zhi nyen la bstam pa dang / gdan la bzhugs par mdzad d// spyan drangs rten la bstam /

166b1(kha): dag pa'i phyag rgya bya ste/ g.yas g.yin gnyis ka nam mkha' la re mos bteg gyin gar thabs su sngon ka log tu bteg go/ de nas snying pos spyan drang pa ni/ a spro mu dag 
166b2(kha): o gsal ha khyab 'di 'bar dkar lam mtha' la 'd dpag bdal bdal/ lan bzhi brjod/ de nas s+dzas kyis spyan rang bazni/ dpon gsas 'khor dang yin bdag rnams/ gtsang 
166b3(kha): gin mdzes pa'i chas su bzhugs/ rnga dang dung dang gshang dang dar 'phan la sogs dang / snyan par bsgrags kyin mdzes par phyar sman dang yos dang / mkhan gyi dud pa sprin du gtibs/ de 
166b4(kha): nas tshig bshad kyis spyan drang ba ni/ tshigs su bcad de gsungs so// mi 'gyur dbyings chen 'byams yas bon gyi dbyings dkyil te/ rang bzhin dkyil 'khor khyab bdal klong yangs

167b1(kha): gzhal yas bris/ bum pa lha'i gzhal yas bskyed/ bdag nyid lha yi gzhal yas bsgrub/ tha mi dad pa'i gzhal yas su / gdan kyang don dang mtshams par bting / skyon gyis /

182b2(kha): o gyi glong dkyil nas/ 'khor ba'i sems can drang ba'i phyir/ sprul pa las du sred pa yi/ sangs po 'brum khri'i sprul pa las/ 'gro ba'i don du srid pa yi/ thugs kyi sred pa 'dul 
182b3(kha): / tog klong dang rji/ sku mdogser 'bar gnser gyi snying po 'a/ phyag mtshan me thub gser gyi rgyal mtshan bsnams/ rlabs chen gser gyi bya khyung khrela bzhugs/ bder gzhegs 
182b4(kha): srid pa spul pa can/ bdag dang rgyu sbyor yin gyi bdag/ mtha' yas sems can sgrib sbyang phyir/ phyag 'tshal mtshan bstod mchod pa 'brul/ de ltar bhar phyogs kyi sred pa nyi shu rtsa / 
182b5(kha): lnga yo 'gro'// stong gsum 'jig ntyen shar phyogs na/ dbyings chen 'byams yas nag po'i kling / rin chen 'bar ba'i gtsal bkram la/ 'odi chen gzha' tshon bskor ba'i 
182b6(kha): gling / gdan chen gsung drung btings pa'i steng / mi 'gyur gdan chen gsung drung gi/ gu zhugs shar phyogs dkar po la/ yig 'bru ya gyi klong dkyil nas/ 'khor ba'i sems can 
183a1(kha): rang ba'i phyir/ 'd zer las du bkye ba'iM/ sten pa gzen rab 'd zer las/ 'gro ba'i don du bkye basiM/ sku'i gshin rab lo bo gsu chen ni/ sgku bdog dkar / 
183a2(kha): 'bar dul gyi snying po 'dra/ phyag mtshan rin chen dul gyi chag shing bsnams/ dbang bsgyur dul gyi 'khor lo'i khre la bzhugs/ bder gshegs gnhin rab 'od zer can/ bdag 
183a3(kha): dang rgyu sbyar yin gyi bdag/ mtha' yas sems can sgrib sbyang phyer/ phyag 'tshal mtshan bstid mchod pa 'brul/ 'di 'bar lha yi gzhal yas mchog/ shar phyogs mi 'gyur 
183a4(kha): g.sung drung gi/ gu zhugs byang phyogs ljang khu la/ yig 'byur gyi klong dkyil nas/ 'khor ba'i sems can drang ba'i phyir/ 'od zer las su bkye ba yi/ ston pa ghen rab 'od zer 
183a5(kha): las/ 'gro ba'i don du bkyi ba yi/ gsung gi gnhen rab lde gsang 'di 'bar ni/ sku mdog ldang 'bar lags kyi snying po 'dra/ phyag mtshan rin chen lhags kyi chag shing bsnams/ 
183a6(kha): dbang sgyur lcags kyi 'khor lo'i khri la bzhugs/ bder gshegs gnhen rab 'od zer can/ bdag dang rgyu sbyor yin gyi bdag/ mtha' yas sems can sgrib sbyang phyir/ phyag 'tshal 
183b1(kha): mtshan bstod mchod pa 'brul/ 'di 'bar lha'i gzhal yas mchog/ shar phyogs mi 'gyur gsung rung gi/ gu zhugs nub phyogs dmar po la/ yig 'bru kha gi klong dkyil nas/ 
183b2(kha): 'khor ba'i sems can rang ba'i phyir/ 'od zer las su bkye ba si/ ston pa gnhen rab 'di zer las/ 'gro ba'i don du bkyi ba yi/ yon tan gyi gnhen rab legs pa kun 'byung 
183b3(kha): ni/ sku mdog dmar 'bar zangs kyi snying po 'dra/ phyag mtshan ran chen zangs kyi chag zhing bsnams/ dbang sgyur zangs kyi 'khor lo'i khre la bzhugs/ bder gshegs gshen rab 
183b4(kha): 'odi zer can/ bdag dang rgyu sbyor yin gyi bdag/ mtha' yas sems can sgrib sbyang phyir/ phyag 'tshal mtshan bstyod mchod pa 'brul/ 'di 'bar lha yi gzhal yas mchog
183b5(kha): khar phyogs mi 'gyur gsung drung gi/ gu zhugs lho phyogs sngon po la/ yig 'bru du gyi glong dkyil nas/ 'khor ba'i sems can drang ba'i phyir/ 'od zer las du bkye ba si/ ston 
183b6(kha): pa gnhen rab 'od zer las/ 'gro ba'i don du bkye ba yi/ 'phrin las kyi gnhen rab snyoms par lhun grub ni/ sku mdog sngo 'bar g.yu yi snying po 'dra/ phyag mtshan rin chen 
184a1(kha): gsu y chag shing bsnams/ dbang syur gsu yi 'khor lo'i khre la bzhugs/ bder gshegs gnhen rab 'od zer can/ bdag dang rgyu sbhor yin gyi bdag/ mtha' yas / 
184a2(kha): sems can sgrib sbyang phyer/ phyag 'tshal mtshan bstyod mtchad pa 'brul/ 'de 'bar lha ya gnal yas mchog/ ha phyogs mi 'gyur gsung dung gi/ dbus kyi snying posr po la/ 
184a3(kha): yig 'bru o gyi klong dkyil nas/ 'khor ba'i sems can drang ba'i phyir/ 'od zer las su bkye ba yi/ ston pa gnhen rab 'od zer las/ 'gro ba'i don du bkye ba yi/ thugs kyi / 
184a4(kha): gnhen rab cang ma 'od rgyas ni/ sku mdog ser 'bar gser gyi snying po 'dra/ phyag mtshan ren chen gser gyi chag shing bsnams/ dbang sgyur gser gyi 'khor lo'i khri la bzhugs/ 
184a5(kha): bder gzegs gzhen rab 'od zer can/ bdag dang rgyu sbyor yin gyi bdag/ mtha' yas sems can sgrib sbyang phyir/ phyag 'tshal mtshan bstod mchod pa 'brul/ de ltar bhar 
184a6(kha): phyogs kyi gnhen rab nyi shu rtsa lnga yi 'gro'o// shar phyogs stong gsum 'jig rten dang / stong gsum 'jig rten par 'das na/ 'jig rten khams kyang bsam las 'das/ bder 
184b1(kha): gshegs sku yang bsam mi khyab/ ci snyed sa yai rdul bas grangs mang bas/ 'gro ba'i don mdzad bder gshegs sku rnams la/ lus ngag yid kyi sgo nas thang bcad nas/ sems can 
184b2(kha): sgrib pa sbyang ba'i phyir/ phyag 'tshal mtshan bsnyid mchod pa 'brul/ de lhar yang bder gzhegs la mchod pa brul te/ de nas mar sems can la sbyin pa don rnam pa lnga btang ste/ 
184b3(kha): phyag rgya thal sbyor snying kar gtad/ ngan song dang spugs snying po brjod/ yas stags sdzas kyi gtor ma btang / tshig bshad tshegs su bcad de brjod/ o~M bdag gi ting 'dzin stobs / 
184b4(kha): mchog dang / bder gshegs brgya yi byin rlabs dang / snying po sngags kyi nus mthu dang / yin bdag bsam pa dag pa yis/ 'dod pa lnga'i yas stags 'di/ dmyal ba'i gnas su 
184b5(kha): byin par shig/ stobs mchog de rnams 'dus pa yis/ tsha grang sdug bsngal zhi bar shig/ bla med go 'pang thob par zhig/ yi dgs gnas su byin par shog/ stobs mchog d 
184b6(kha): rnams 'dus pa yis/ bkres skom sdug bsngal zhi bar shog/ bla med go 'phang thob par shig/ byil song gnas su phyin par shog/ stobs mchog de rnams 'dus pa yis/ glen 
185a1(kha): lcugs sdug bsngal zhi bar shig/ bla med go 'phang thob par shig/ mi yi gnas su phyin par shig/ stobs mchog de rnams 'dus pa yis/ 'pho 'gyur sdug bsngal / 
185a2(kha): na bar shig/ bla med go 'pa thob par zhig/ lha man gnas du byen par zhig/ stobs mchogde rnams 'dus pa yis/ 'thab rtsod dug bsngal zhi bar zhig/ bla med go 'pas
185a3(kha): thob par shig/ lha yi gnas su phyin par shig/ stobs mchog de rnams 'dus pa yis/ pham ltung sdug bsngal zhi bar shig/ bla med go 'phang thob par shig/ mchod sbyin rgyas 
185a4(kha): pa'i byin rlabs kyis/ bar ma de yi sems can rnams/ gnas ngan len pa'i sgo tshod nas/ mi lus gtsang bar skye bar zhog/ mi lus gtsang mar skyes nas kyang / ston pa'i zhal 
185a5(kha): mthong gsung thos shig/ de la sgrib gnyis sbyang tshogs gnyis s+dzogs te/ bla med go 'phang thob par zshig/ de nas tingnge 'dzin gyis phyag 'tshal ba dang / mchod pa 'brul ba dang / byin 
185a6(kha): pa btang bar mdzad de/ bder gshegs sems can gnyis ka mchod pas mnyes cing byin pas tshem par gyur nas/ gnyis med gcig la mnyam par ting nge 'dzin gyis bzungno // 
185b1(kha): mchod sbyen rgyas pa de ya yon tan gyis/ kon tse lasogs sems can bsam pa dag pa rnams/ threb byang mngon par shes pa gnsal kyin rdzu 'drul rkang pa tsog/ me tog par dang
185b2(kha): gna' tshen 'd kyang byung / de la sems can kun kyangdad pa skyes/ sku gdang rnams kyi mnga' yang thobsku gzugs rnams kyang bder gshegs znal du lhag lhag ston/ gsung rab 
185b3(kha): rnams kyang zhal dri rang gsung rang gis s+grogs/ dkyil 'khor bum pa dpon gss kyang / sa las 'phags nas 'od du gsal/ phyogs bcu' 'jig rten kun tu gsal/ sgra snyan 
185b4(kha): grags kyin 'od zer 'phros/ de ltar shar nas bzung nas/ byang dang nub dang lho dang steng dang / byang shar dang byang nub dang lho nub lho shar dang / 'og dang yo shar phyogs ci bzhin du 'gro'o// 
185b5(kha): bder gzhegs stong gi mtshan ni gong du le'u dgu pa'i nang du smos so// bder bar gshegs pa la mchod pa 'brul ba dang / sems can rnams la sbyin pa btang pa dang / slud ma'i sems 
185b6(kha): can rnams la dpe bstan pa'i 'phrin las kyi don bstan pa'o// de nas yang dpon gsas mnga' bdag gis/ mchod sbyin rgyas pa'i rnying la/ sems can sdig chen drangs pa'i phyir// 
186a1(kha): bha byag 'tsal nas ldeg pa bshags pa mdzad // de la yang don rnam pa lnga te/ phyag rgya dang / rdyeng o dang / srdjas dang / tshig bshad dang / tingng 'dzin dang lnga'o// de la / 
186a2(kha): phyag rgyas sdig pa bshags pa ni/ gus pa mos btud kyi phyag rgya y zhes bya ste/ thal mo sbyar nas dpral bar gtad do// de nas snying pos sdig pa bshags pa ni/ ngan song dng sug gi 
186a3(kha): snying po lan bzhi brjod/ de nas rdzas kyis sdig pa bshags pa ste/ lus ngag yid gsum gus pa'i phyag 'tshal/ de nas tshig bshad kyi tshegs su bcad d sdig pa bshags te/ skye ba 
186a4(kha): dang po dpag tu med pa nas/ da lta 'khor ba'i sdug bsngal lus blang 'dir/ mi dge sdig pa'i las rnams ci bgyis pa/ bder gshegs lha gshen rnams la bshags pa 'brul/ bdag 
186a5(kha): dang bdag 'dra'i sems can dig po cha/ zhe sdang me ltar 'bar ba'i rnam thin gyis/ dmyal batsha grang gnas du 'khyams du te/ byams pa chen po' thugs las byung ba'i lha/ 'od / 
186a6(kha): dkar gnas 'dzin thugs rje der ma chung / dmyal ba tsha grang gnas su 'khyams nas drings/ gcod sbyong dmyal ba thams cad rgyun chad nas/ zhe sdang byams pa'i klong du zhi bar shig/ 
186b1(kha): skye ba dang po dpag tu med pa na/ da lta 'khor ba'i sdug bsngal lus blang 'dir/ mi dge sdeig pa'i las rnams ci bgyis pa/ bder gshegs lha gzhen rnams la bshags pa 'brul/ 
186b2(kha): bdag dang bdag 'dra'i sems can sdig po che/ 'dod chags chu lthar 'khol ba'i rnam thin gyis/ ya dgas bkres skom gnas su 'khyams su te/ sbyen pa chen po'i thugs las 
186b3(kha): byung ba'i lha/ gar gsas btsan po'i thugs rje der ma chung / yi dgas bkres sgom gnas su 'khyams na drngs/ bkres skom yi dgs thams cad rgyun chad nas/ 'dod chags 
186b4(kha): sbyin pa'i klong du zhi bar shig/ skye ba dang po dpag tu med pa nas/ da lha 'khor ba'i sdug bsngal lus blang 'dir/ mi dge sdig pa'i las rnams ci bgyis pa/ bder gshegs lha gnhen 
186b5(kha): rnams la bshags pa 'brul/ bdag dang bdag 'dra' sems can sdig po cha/ gti bug mun ltar sres pa'i rnam thaMn gyis/ byil song grlen lcugs gnas su 'khyams su te/ yae 
186b6(kha): shes chen po'i thugs las byung ba'i lha/ rgod gsas khams pa thugs rje der ma chung / byil song glen lhugs gnas su 'khyams na drings/ glin lcugs byol song thams cad rgyun 
187a1(kha): chad nas/ gte mug ye zhes klong du znhi bar zhig/ skye ba dang po dpag tu med pa nas/ da lta 'khor ba'i sdug bsngal lus blang 'dir/ mi dge sdig pa'i las rnams ci / 
187a2(kha): bgyis pa/ bder gshegs lha gzhen rnams la bshags pa 'brul/ bdag dang bdag 'dra'i sems can sdig po che/ phrag dogs ltar skyes pa'i rnam smin gyis/ mtha' 'khob ma 
187a3(kha): yi gnas su 'khyams su nye/ yangs pa chen po'i thugs las byung ba'i lha/ gsas rje rmang po thugs rje der ma chung / mtha' 'khob mi yi gnas su 'khyams na drings/ mtha' 
187a4(kha): 'khob mi rnams thams cad rgyun chad nas/ phrag dag yangs pa'i klong du zhi bar shog/ skye ba dang po dpag tu med pa nas/ da lta 'khor ba'i sdug bsngal lus blang 'dir/ mi dge sdig / 
187a5(kha): pa'i las rnams ci bgyis pa/ bder gshegs lha gshen rnams la bshags pa 'bul/ bdag dang bdag 'dra'i sems can sdig po che/ nga rgyal rlung ltar 'tshub pa'i rnam smin gyis/ 
187a6(kha): lha min 'thab rtsod gnas su 'khyams su nye/ zhi ba chen po'i thugs las byung ba'i lha/ gnam gsas dbyings rnam thugs rje der ma chung / lha min 'thab rtsod gnas su 
187b1(kha): 'khyams na drings/ gsod gcod lha min thams cad rgyun chad nas/ nga rgyal zhi ba'i klong du zhi bar shig/ 'khor ba'i dug lnga de ltar rgyun chad nas/ mi 'khor ye shes lnga yi 
187b2(kha): rtsal ldan te/ tbon nyid dbyings nas thugs nyid mnyam pa'i lha/ mkha' dbyings dkar po'i dbyings su tim gyur cig/ de nas tingnge 'dzin gyis sdeig pa bshags pa mdzad d// bdag dang 
187b3(kha): mtha' yas sems can rnams/ sprul pa'i sku ltar gzugs kyi phung po rdul phra rab kyi char pbye ba tsam du gyes nas/ phyogs bcu' bder gshegs rnams kyi spyan lam du/ lha 
187b4(kha): phyag 'tshal zhing sdig pa bshags par ting nge 'dzin gyis bzung ngo // lus ngag yid gsum dad pa yis/ dkyil 'khor las sogs lha rnams la/ lha phyag 'tshal zhing sdig pa 
187b5(kha): bshags pa'i 'phrin las kyi don bstan pa'o// de nas yang dpon gsas mnga' bdag gis/ mar me tshogs nas sgo dbye bar mdzad de/ de la yang don rnam pa lnga ste/ phyag rgya dang / 
187b6(kha): snying po dang / s+dzas dang tshiegs bshad dang / ting nge 'dzin dang lnga'o// de la phyag rgyas sgo dbye ba ni/ sgron ma 'od zer gyi phyag rgya zhes bya ste/ gung mo gnyis mdun gyi rtse bar sprad nas 
188a1(kha): / #/ gnam du bstan/ phyi ma rnams thur du s la pra la bstan to// de nas snying pos rgo dbye ste/ a lo spro a lo spros pa lo phro spros 'bar lo gsal/ lan bzhi gar 
188a2(kha): stabs kyis brjod do// de nas s+dzas kyi sgo dbye ste/ yon bdag thams cad thal mo sbyar ba'i bar du mar me thogs te/ mdangs dang 'dzum bstan te/ shar phyogs nas bsrigs so//

188a4(kha): de gsungs pa/ 'khor ba'i sems can ma rig pa/ 'khor ba tsig ma med pa na/ ming dang gzugs la brten pa 'dir/ ma reg mun pa'i klong na gnas/ bon la zhes rab tshad slob 
188a5(kha): pa'i/ dpon gas sdig pa'i blo ldan pga/ rig pa'i yo shes rtsal bskyed nas/ sems nyid con la 'jug par shar/ shar gyi phyogs kyi sgo sung la/ dad pa'i stobs kyis mchod pa 
188a6(kha): 'brul/ mar me sgron mas sgo dbye bas/ sems la rig pa shar bar 'gyur/ de skad ces dpon gss kyis gsungs te/ yin bdag dar dkar phub brkyang ba'i bar nas yar byung ste// 
188b1(kha): chu bur gyi mig btsum nas/ sems nyid kyi spyan gyis bltas pas/ rig pa'i lde mig gis shar phyogs zhe sdang gi sgo phyes te/ dbal gyi khro chen ma bzad brjeid pa dang / mtshan 
188b2(kha): dang ldan pa'i gto bu 'brum sangs nyid du gyur/ 'khor ba'i bon rgyu bzhi gzugs kyi phung po la brten pa thams cad/ mun pa la sgron me btegs pa ltar gsal bar gyur to// shong 
188b3(kha): ce la sogs yin bdag dad pa can rnams kyang / zhe sdang byams par zhi bar shar nas rig pa shar ro// de nas byang gi phyogs kyi sgo srung la/ dad pa'i stobs kyis mchod pa 'brul/

188b5(kha): chags kyi sgo byes te/ dbal gyi khro chen ma bzad brjid pa yang / mtshan dang ldan pa'i yid kyi khe' chung nyid du gyur/ 'khor ba'i bon rgyu ming bzhi' phung po la brten pa thams 
188b6(kha): cad/ sgyu ru ra lag mthil du bzhag pa nyid ltar gsal bar gyur to// kong cso la sogs yin bdag dad pa can rnams kyang / 'dod chags sbyin par zhi nas byang nas sgrib pa byang ngo // 
189a1(kha): de nas nub kyi phyogs kyi sgo srung la/ dad pa'i stobs kyis mchod pa 'brul/ mar me sgron mas rgo dbye bas/ sems la rig pa shar bar gyur/ chu bur gyi mig btsum / 
189a2(kha): nas/ sems nyid kyi spyan gyis bltas pas/ rig pa'i lhe big gis thub phyogs gti bug gi sgo byes te/ dbal gyi khro chen ma bzad brjed pa yang / mtshan dang ldan pa'i ba lo / 
189a3(kha): skyin gyi ral ga can nyid du gyur/ mya ngan las 'das pa bon zag med la brten pa bar lha 'od gsal g.sung drung sems dpa' rnams/ rig pa ci ltar gnas bzhin me long la 
189a4(kha): g.ya' dag pa ltar/ sa le ma rmongs gsal bar gyur to// kong se la sogs yin bdag dad pa can rnams kyang / gti mug ye shes su zhi nas nub nas ma mthong pa mthong ba'i 
189a5(kha): lam sgo pyes pa'o// de nas lho yi phyogs kyi sgo srung la/ dad pa'i stobs kyis mchod pa 'bul/ mar me sgrin mas sgo dbye bas/ sems la rig pa shar bar 'gyur/ chu bur gyi / 
189a6(kha): mig btsum nas/ sems nyid kyi spyan gyis bltas pas/ rig pa'i lde mig gis lho phyogs phrag dog gi sgo phyes te/ dbal gyi khro chen mi bzad brjid pa yang / mtshan dang ldan / 
189b1(kha): pa'i g.su lo g.su ya lan phran can nyid du gyur/ 'jig rten khams nas bder gshegs spul sku rnams sprin med mkha' la nyi shar ci bzhin gsal bar gyur to// kong tse la

189b3(kha): lhang nga gsal bar mthongs // shin tu dang spro yad dga' sems la nyi ma shar/ de ltar 'khor ba thar pa gnyis ka dbu mar bde bar gshegs so// de nas ting nge 'dzin gyi mar me btegs 
189b4(kha): nas sgo dbye bar mdzad do// de nas bdag dang mtha' yas pa'i sems can gyis kyang / ma rig pa'i sgo rig pa'i lde mig gis sphyes nas/ sa le yongs su gsal bar ting nge 'dzin gyis 
189b5(kha): bzungso// sems nyid dag pa'i rdul zhugs kyis bar metsogs nas/ dkyil 'khor gyi rgo dbye ba'i 'phren las kyi don bstan pa'o// de nas yang dpon gsas mna' bdag gis/ me 
189b6(kha): tog thogs nas smon lam gdab par mdzad de/ de la yang don rnam pa lnga ste/ phyag rgya dang / snying po dang / s+dzas dang / tshig bshad dang / ting nge 'dzin dang lnga'o// de la phyag rgyas smon 
190a1(kha): lam gdab pa ni/ sems dag dad ldan gyi phyag rgya zhes bya ste/ lus tcig pur yin bdag rnams 'dug nas/ thal mo sbyar nas pbral bar gtad // de nas snying pos 
190a2(kha): smon lam gdab ste/ o~M mkha' dbyings dag par a 'bar gsal/ oM mkha' dbyings khyab par a lo bdal/ oM mkha' dbyings rgod 'bar a he ho mu la rgyas/ lan bzhi / 
190a3(kha): brjod do// de nas sdzas kyi smon lam gdab ste/ me tog sna tshigs tshigs su bcad kyin gtor ro// de nas tshig bshad kyi tshigs su bcad de smon lam gdab pa ni/ 'jig rten 
190a4(kha): gzugs ni sgyu ma ste/ sgyu ma'i gzugs la mi 'khor bar/ bon nyid sems nyid bdal pa ru/ mi 'gyur sku dang ldan gyur cig/ 'jig rten ngagni sgyu ma ste/ sgyu ma'i ngag la ma 
190a5(kha): 'khor bar/ con nyid sems nyid bdal pa ra/ mi 'gag gsung dang ldan gyur cig/ 'jig rten yid ni sgru ba ste/ sgyu ma'i yid la mi 'khor bar/ can nyid sems nyid bdal pa r/ 
190a6(kha): g.sung drung thugs dang ldan 'gyur gcig/ 'jig rten yon tan skyon yin te/ skyon la yon tan mi zer ba/ bon nyid sems nyid bdal pa ru/ nges pa'i yon tan 'byung gyur cig/ 
190b1(kha): 'jig rten 'phrin las log pa ste/ log pa'i phyogs su mi brtsen par/ tson nyid sems nyid bdal pa r/ dam pa'i 'phrin las spyod gyur cig/ de rnams tshang par 'dzoms nas / 
190b2(kha): kyang / las kyi khams gsum 'khor ba yi/ mdig sems can nyon mongs kun/ bdag gis bde bar 'dreng par shig/ de nas ting nge 'dzin gyis mtog pul nas/ shon lam 
190b3(kha): gdab ste/ bdag dang mtha' yas pa'i sems can rnams/ dus gcig la bder gshegs rnams kyi spyan lam du / me tog gtor gyin smon lam 'debs par ting nge 'dzin gyis 
190b4(kha): bzung'o // shes rab byang ba'i sems nyid kyis/ me tog gtor nas thon lam btab pa'i 'phren las kyi don bstan pa'o// de nas yang dpon gsas mnga' bdag gis bum khrus byas 
190b5(kha): nas/ dbang bskur bar mdzad de/ de la yang don rnam pa lnga ste/ phyag rgya dang / snying po dang / s+dzas dang / tshig bshad dang / ting nge 'dzin dang lnga'o// de la phyag rgyas dbang bskur bazhi/ 
190b6(kha): mnyam bdal 'di 'gyed kyi phyag rgya zhes bya ste/ g.yon pa'i thal mo thugs kar gtad/ g.yas pa'i thal mo gnam la btegs cings la phab bo// de nas snying pos dbang bskur 
191a1(kha): te/ bsolng bmu zer bso sro mu rgyas b'i 'bar mu bdal a he'i yongs su yangs yangs/ lan bzhi brjod // de nas srdzas kyis dbang bskur te/ dbus kyi bam pa /

215a4(kha): yin/ khyim pa rnams ni dmyal ba'i 'dam skyil yin/ rab tu byung pa rnams ni bde gnas skam slob yin/ khyim pa rnams ni mya ngan mtsho skyel yin/ rab tu byung pa rnams ni 
215a5(kha): dga' skyid nyi mshar/ khyim pa rnams ni dug gi lo ma rgyas/ rab tu byung pa rnams ni sman gyi 'bras bu than/ dga' ba de ni nyi shar 'di las gsal ba med/ rig pa'i rtsal med 
215a6(kha): mun pa'i tshogs las dge ru rtse/ nges pa'i don la log 'khrul rgyab kyis phyogs/ 'khor ba'i khyim la sdug bsngal dang du blangs/ log 'khrul sems can nyon mongs snying ro rje/ 
215b1(kha): zang zing khyim 'khor spangs nas bdag nyid me tog gling la 'gro/ sems dga' rang gi rtsal gyi gshig dug rgyas par shog/ chu rgyun khyim la gnas pa sdug bsngal mi chad phyi phyir 
215b2(kha): 'gyod de 'ang / de skad ces gsungs nas/ sku lus thug pug lan drug sugs nas/ me las gshig skyes mkha' lding shang shang d'u/ pad zhu las su bya bal skyes/ snyod gos las su 
215b3(kha): ce' phran skyes/ pad lham las su 'gyig ldems skyes/ thad gis las su shang shang gzhog pa g.yas pa skyes/ rhad 'og las su shang hang gzhog pa g.yon pa skyes/ shad sham las / 
215b4(kha): su gang shang mdzug sgro skyes/ thugs rje chen po'i byin rlabs kyis/ sku las gshog drug de ltar rgyas/ rab tu byung dbang med pa'i 'khor sdes bzung bas ma thub par/ rgyal chen rigs 
215b5(kha): bzhi' lhas bsu nas bar snang stong par 'pur te gshegs/ slad nas ston pa'i sku 'khor la/ sde rigs gnyis su chad pa yang / ston pa 'pur nas gshegs pa'i rjes su kun kas 
215b6(kha): bltas nas su / sde gcig ston pa'i slad gang nas/ gtang rag byin cing gar thabs sgyur/ mchod pa 'brul gyin me tog 'thor/ lha phyag 'bul gyin skor ba byed/ sde gcig ston 
216a1(kha): pa'i su gan nas/ smre sngags 'don nang mya ngan byed/ dumi 'dbasg shing mtshe ma 'byed/ de'i csho de' dus ni/ ston pa gshen rab mkhoni/ dum bu rtsa gsum ba / 
216a2(kha): gnas su bbs nas/ ngna pa'i rgyal po chu 'byed kyi rigs dang chu las 'o ma phye zhing tsigs r dang / 'bras sa le nyag ma re gsol nas/ bya yi dka' thub lo gcig mr// de nas 
216a3(kha): rgyal chen rigs bzhi' nags la babs nas/ sre'u rgyal po ha nu ma 'da' dang / shing tog gi 'bru re dang / shing lo'i char pa re dang / kha ba chags pa'i chu tchigs re gsol gyin/ 
216a4(kha): spre'u yi dka' thub lo gcig mdzad/ de nas 'ol mo lung rang du me tog gling la byin nas/ chu sing ga'i thegs pa re dang / rtra u mer ro'i mchog ma ri gsol nas/ nub mo / 
216a5(kha): me'i cha byad du bzhugs kyin/ nyen mo hang shang bya yi chas su bzhugs nas/ mi'i dka' thub lo gcig mdzad/ de ltar dka' thub lo gsum mdzad nas/ sku lus bkrag zhor 
216a6(kha): rus mgo pags kyis g.yogs/ lhu tshigs rtsibs ma grangs su bgrang du btub/ lus po zhad smad de yi yon tan gyis/ phrag dog ma nus syangs pa'i stobs dang ldan/ nga rgyal ma / 
216b1(kha): nus sems nyid ngng du zhi/ gti mug ma rmongs gcig pu'i don du gsal/ 'dod chags mi rgyu kun gzhi' bag la nyal/ zhe sdang mi skye byams par ma le lhan/ de yang longs spyod / 
216b2(kha): zang zing 'khor la mi chags gcig pur gnas pa'i yon tan no// thub mo gnyid log rmaM lam thun phran la/ zang zing slod dang 'khor la breng 'phreng zhag 'ga' haMs/ sad nas 
216b3(kha): thugs la dgongs pa la/ rmi lam ngan pa rgyu ba 'di/ 'bras bu dngos su tshom na yang / kun gzhi' dkyil na rgyu gnas pas/ rgyu las 'bras bu phyir skyes nges/ 'khor ba'i phyogs 
216b4(kha): su mi 'phreng par/ nges pa'i don la 'phreng bar bskyed/ don la nges par 'phreng ba dang / s+dzas la brten par dgongs gnas su / hos ru dang ba me tog gling la btsugs/ phyag rgya thal sbyor 
216b5(kha): nam mkha' dbyings su bstan/ snying po 'd dpag mu zer gsal 'bar yongs khyab bdal/ lan lnga brjod nas/ tshig bshad tshig bzhi gsungs pa/ 'khor ba'i phyogs su mi 'phreng 
216b6(kha): par/ dam pa'i don la 'phreng ba yi/ grangs su bgrang pa'i yon tan s+dzas/ ldzon shing lo 'bras rgyas par shog/ phyag rgya snying po smon lam nus mthu des/ zhag gsum nangs par ya 
217a1(kha): y/ mtshan che ba'i shing gcig skyes/ sdeng b rten po che bzhin bkra la gsal/ sal g bzhin phyogs bzhi' bha dag 'ar/ khar dkar byag lan thab dpar b+hoo/ dbus 
217a2(kha): ni ren po che bzhin ser la dangs/ lo ma 'bras ba lnga yang de dang mtshungs/ ston pa'i thugs je byin rlabs kyis/ shing gi 'bras bu rigs lnga btus/ shi zhun thag pa rigs lngar 
217a3(kha): bkal/ dam pa'i don la 'phreng ba yi/ 'khor bar mi 'phreng bgrang pa'i phyir/ pad zhun 'phreng thag dkar po la/ shar phyogs dkar po dung gi 'phreng ba brgyas/ pad kun 'phreng thag ldang / 
217a4(kha): khu la/ byang phyogs ljang khu zhal gyi phreng ba brgyud/ pad zhun phreng nag dmar po la/ nhub phyogs dmar po rag ha'i phreng ba brgyud/ pad hun shreng thag sngon po la/ lho phyogs sngon po 
217a5(kha): man lung 'phreng ba brgyas/ pad hun 'phreng thag ser po la/ dbus phyogs ser po b+ha te rtsi'i 'phreng ba brgyas/ grangs ni stong dang rtsa brgyad do// mdo bsdus cig le gcig la nges/ 
217a6(kha): g.yon pa'i phyag sor lnga la bkal/ 'phreng thag dbyings kyi yum dang sbyar/ sa drig er sangs yi dam lha/ mdo 'dzin ye shes lha dang sbyar/ gnhen lha 'di dkar yi dam lha/ mthe 
217b1(kha): bing thabs kyi mchog dang sbyar/ sangs po 'brum khri yi dam lha/ mdzub mo shes rab pul du sbar/ ston pa gnhen rab 'dren pa'i dpon/ glung mo gang bgrang rig pa nyid/ thabs dang shes / 
217b2(kha): rab 'brel ba' bar/ rig pa'i ye shes brtyen pa yis/ gsum gyi slabs su grangs kyen bgrangs/ 'khor ba'i rjes su mi 'phreng bar/ bder gzhegs don la 'phreng ba'i phyir/ bder 
217b3(kha): gshegs stong gi mtshan grangs bgrangs/ brgyad ni sgo bzhi phyi nang brgyad/ zhi khro'i tshul du ci bzhin bgrangs/ dam pa'i don du 'phreng ba yis/ bder gshegs stong gi mtshan re la/ 
217b4(kha): snying po rnam gsum rim par bzlas/ grangs kyi tshad ni lnga lngar 'dzab tu pul/ g.yas pa'i sor mo re res blangs/ sgo bzhi mdzod lnga'i bon la 'phreng ba'i phyir/ dpon gss dung gi / 
217b5(kha): 'phreng ba bgrangs/ khyab nag shal gyi 'phreng ba bgrangs/ 'phan yul man lung 'phreng ba bgrangs/ gtsang ma mtho tsag pyi rgyug cig le chen pos bzlas pa dang brjod med rho te rtse'i 
217b6(kha): 'phreng ba bgrangs/ nyon mongs rgyu 'bras gdar thag gcad pa'i phyir/ mi yaings don la 'phreng gin bgrangs pas bsod nams dpag tu med/ dka' ba sna tshogs thub na tshul khrims 
218a1(kha): rnam par dag/ stobs mtcshog d yi nus b ba yis/ rgyu 'bras gnyis ka' bag chags gar cag gco/ de'i cho de'dus na/ bdu rje khyab pa lasogs te/ bdu / 
218a2(kha): 'khor 'brum ste mang po yang / lho lu dang na bhun thaM g rgyur bsdzus/ gnhen la la nyan byed pa yang / shin tu mang bar dad pa skyes/ bdud rje khyab pa lag ring yang / shin tu gting 
218a3(kha): nas dad pa skyes/ ston pas mdzad pa'i spyod yul la/ ngo mtshar gdung ba rab tu skyes/ bdud 'khor rnams la bka' bsrtsal pa/ gnhen rab mdzad pa'i rim pa la/ dad pa'i sems 
218a4(kha): spro yid dang 'thad/ las la dge sdig yod par nges/ tshe la snga phyi yod par nges/ gnas la skyid sdug yod par nges/ 'jig rten 'khor ba'i sems can la/ longs spyod zang zeng ci yod 
218a5(kha): kyang / phyi nang mi chags yang bar rigs/ mi rtag sgyu ma yin par nges/ mi mkhyen dgu mkhyen rnam pa thams cad mkhyen pa yi/ gnhen rab thugs la sa le gsal bas su / 
218a6(kha): longs spyod skyed rtags rgyal srid 'di tsam la/ mi chags mi 'khor phyir la yongs spangs nas/ me tog gling la gcig pu gnas pa 'di/ 'jig rten zang zing thams cad sgyu ma 
218b1(kha): yin/ nag po bdud kyi dmag tshogs ji snyid kyis/ ston pa ghen rab sku la cho 'phrul sna dgu bstan/ ba su rgya gcig gcod par ma nus nas/ ston pa nyid kyis nyid bcom 
218b2(kha): rgyan dang dbu sgra bnar/ dmigs med byin pa phyogs bzhir gtong lugs kyis/ ces kyang las la dge sdig yod par nges/ 'o skol bdud kyi dbag tshogs ji snyed kyis/ sten pa'i 
218b3(kha): 'khor la csho 'phrul mang po bstan/ gnyen bza' ne'u chung re zhig de bsus tsam/ gnhen rab rang gi stobs kyis rang bcom nas/ skyid rtags rgyal srid 'di snyed tsam bar nas/ 
218b4(kha): gcig pu me tog gling la rab tu byung ba 'di/ ces kyang las la dge sdig yod par nges/ nag po bdud kyi dmag tshogs ji snyed kyis/ ston pa'i sku la cho 'phrul ci bstan kyang / na 
218b5(kha): bdun ra zhig pyed thobs pbyir la zhir/ gnhen rab thugs rjes rang gis rang bcom nas/ zang zeng longs spyod sgyu ma'i bsu brid yin par nges/ ma lus thams cad sangs nas gcig 
218b6(kha): pu gling la gshegs/ rtsa mchog chu thigs re las mi gsol bar/ shing 'bras b+ho te rtsi'i grangs bgrangs shing / 'jig rten khams 'dir tur tsam mi 'phreng par/ snang stong gnyis 
219a1(kha): med mnyam pa'i lha rnams la/ mi yaings gzungs kyi 'phreng ba brangs su bgrang / thus dang gtsang sra rkir ba lha byag 'tshal/ thyimsngs rab tu byung nans lo gsum / 
219a2(kha): len pa la/ lha spyod gnyis ka mi 'tshol tshad cig 'dzin/ szhir bkrag yal rnas 'g pags kyis g.yogs/ nang gi glo snying phyi nas bltas pas gsal/ lhau tshegs rtsib ma / 
219a3(kha): glen pas bgrang du btub/ las la dge sdig cis kyang yod par nges/ skyes mchog 'di la skye 'chi yod par nges/ 'phral gyi me bade chung du spun thung 'dis/ ypun gyi bde ba chen po / 
219a4(kha): gtan du tshel bar nges/ skye 'chi med par gtan du sku rtag na/ sdug bsngal 'di yi ched gal kho la ci zhig 'byung / 'o cag bdud rnams rtag tu re ba snying rdo rje/ mi rtag 'chi ba'i 
219a5(kha): las 'di da yang myur du 'ong / mi bzad dmyal ba'i btsiM bsreg nang du d yang 'gro bar nges/ 'jig rten brang g sa yi yud 'di la/ bdud kyi me drag spyod pas ci la phan/ skyes mchog 
219a6(kha): ston par skyabs su myur te 'ding / de skad ces 'khor la gsungs so// de la bdud kyi bka' blon gyad bu thung la sogs pa'i/ bdud kyi 'khor ba 'bum sde mang po la/ 'khor ba thog ma 
219b1(kha): med pa'i dus nas su/ kun gzhi'i dkyil du bag chags bzang ngan bsags/ bzang ngan 'dres pa thams cad bzang po'i rkyen dang 'phrad pas langs/ dad pa skyes pa rnams kyis phyir la /

219b3(kha): myur te gshegs/ skyabs su gyur te ma ghegs na/ 'phral gyi skyed khe chung du 'di/ sun gyi mi bde chen por lung / de'i phyir na myur te gshegs/ dad pa skyes pa'i bdud rnams

219b5(kha): gnhen la dad/ bdud rje mnga' che gar dad mdzod/ bdag cag sund ma 'ga' lus pa/ gnhen rab mi bo'i spyod pa la/ dad pa ma skyes spyod pa log/ las dang spyod pa ye mi mthun// 
219b6(kha): bdag cag bdud 'khor 'ga' lus 'di/ dang po ma las skye dus su / las su gsod dang gcod la dga'/ zas su sha dang khrag la dad/ longs spyod 'thab dang 'khrig la dad/ gshen rab 
220a1(kha): longs spyod de la ma skyabsso// de skad cis smras nas/ bdu yul mun pa'i glang du bros te songso// de'i tsho de'i dus na/ bdu rje khyab pa la sogs pa'i/ bd kyi 'khor /

220a3(kha): pa lag ring gis/ ston pa'i snyan du zhus pa'i mod/ thams cad sgyu bar rig pa yi/ mi mchog ston pa'i sgrin ma lags/ mi chags stobs kyis rgyal srid yongs bor nas/ me

220a5(kha): 'phreng / mznor nges pa'i don dam la/ mi 'gyur thugs kyi mi yangs 'phreng / lo gsum ston pas dka' thub mdzad/ lha spyod gnyis la 'tchal ma mana'/ don dang ldan pa'i skyes 
220a6(kha): mchog la/ bdag cag ma rig 'khrul pa yi/ nag po bdud kyi sde rigs rnams/ dad pa skyes nas skyabs su gsol/ de skad ces smras nas/ bdud thams cad kyi ston pa'i zhabs 
220b1(kha): la spyi bos gtugs nas/ gus pas lha bhyag btsal lo// de la ston pas bka' ba rtsal pa/ rdul zhugs dad ldan skyes mchog khyad par can/ bdag gi rkyen gyis zab bor 
220b2(kha): sbyangs pas/ skal bzang las 'phro can bzang bas/ mi 'gyur dgun gzhu' rgyud bzhin dad pa skyes/ rig pa'i rtsal ldan thams cad sgyu mar rig/ dus la brtson thebs sdig 
220b3(kha): tshogs phyag mas btab/ ye shes rtsal skyes 'dus pa'i 'khor rab yin/ de skad ces bka' ba rtsal nas/ ston pa rab tu byung ba'i 'khor 'dus pa dang po de rnams la/ go 'byed

220b5(kha): bzhag la/ ston pa 'khor nas khyen du r/ lo gcig lo gnyis lo gsum la/ bsdad pas mkhyen kho thag chod/ kun ka 'dus nas gros byas nas/ yid kyi khe' chung zung pud 
220b6(kha): can/ shes rab gsal bas smras pa'i md/ 'jig rten 'khor ba'i sa 'di la/ rgyal srid rin chen zang zing sgyu ma yin/ sems nyid log par bslus nas su/ ngan song 'khor bar

221b1(kha): nas/ phyi ma'i 'tshang rgya thob pas su/ shin tu spro ba skyes nas dga'/ yid kyi khye' chung zur pud can/ yi ge 'brul gyi slag pa gyon/ mgyogs pa 'byug gi ta la zhin// /

222a1(kha): 'khor ma bus/ d lta log nas'ong pa yin/ ston pa'i bka' gcig 'khrul pa'i 'khor/ sems la dran pacsi ltar rgyu/ 'jig rten thams la 'dug pa si/ nag /

222b1(kha): la zhi bha' cagspar brtegla la zhi bha'i rgo sgyu/ bdu kyi nyan pa lashin tu yangal rab tu kyi sang 'jigs pa / glag chen'o gdang / rtag gsag gtrol bo brgyar

222b4(kha): yis/ phyogs dang ris med kun ka bde la bskod/ sgyu ma'i phung po bcom nas/ drigs pa'i bdud kyang thul/ thugs je chen po'i byin rlabs de yis 'jig rten khams kyang bar der 
222b5(kha): g.yo zhing 'gyur/ lu lu thug thug rab tu tshems par 'gyur/ nam mkha' khams nas me tog char pa bbas/ gnha' tshen ri mo bar snang mkha' la bkra/ sa gzhi rto shang kun 
222b6(kha): ka 'od du 'bar/ snga ma'i me tog bkrag kyang dgu 'gyur tsam gyis gsal/ sems can kun kyang rab tu spro ba skyes/ bdud kyi nyan pa rnams kyang phyir bkyed go bsal lo// btsun / 
223a1(kha): mo sras la sogs pa'i 'khor mang po yis/ sten pa'i sku la bskor ba byas mchod pa dul/ sku lus cha byad mthong nas kun ka mtshe ma 'byin/ bar der bdu je /

223a3(kha): cha byad mthong nas snying rje mchi ma 'byin pa nyes/ shes rab chen po mnga' ba'i gshen rab ni/ 'phral gyi sdug bsngal chung du 'di yais yun gyi bde ba chen po 'tshol/ shes pa chung 
223a4(kha): du log par 'khrul pa'i 'o cag ni/ 'phral gyi skyed khe chung du 'dis/ yun gyi sdug bsngal chen por ltung / skyes mchog 'di la snying rje skyes nas du bshes pa 'khrul/ snying rje yang 
223a5(kha): dag bya ba rang cag 'khor rnams yin/ rang la rang gis gdungs nas du ba tsam/ bdag dang bdag rigs nag po bdud rnams kyang / sngon kyang las ngan spyad dam drag rtsal bdud du skyes/ dang

240a1(kha): me chags gnyis med nus mthus bsam gtan g.yo 'khrugs'ang / dug gsum rtsa ba 'dod khams gsum la sang / dug gnyis rtsa ba gzugs khams gsum 
240a2(kha): la snga/ cha mnyam bag chags gzugs med gsum lasng / 'doid khams gsum po g rim dbye shag 'di ltar ro// ngan song gsum ni 'dod pa'i sa gcig yin/ ye shes 
240a3(kha): byams pa sbyin pa gsum gyis sang / mtha' 'khob mi dang lha min 'dod pa'i sa gcig yin/ zhi ba yangs pa'i stobs kyis sang / 'dod pa'i sa gcig 'dod pa'i lha rigs bdun/ 
240a4(kha): dal 'byor zhi ba'i sems nyid dag pas sang / gzugs kyi sa gcig tshangs pa dge dang 'odi dang gsum/ zhi dal khod snyoms thag chod dpung gis sang / gzugs kyi sa gcig sprin med 
240a5(kha): bode nams 'bras bu'i lha rigs gsum/ shes pa'i rgyud sbyangs mi g.yo brtan pas sang / gzugs kyis gcig gtsang ma'i lha rigs lnga/ phye nang gzung 'dzin me chags su 
240a6(kha): mas sang / gzugs med sa gcig skye mched ming bzhi nyid/ bag chags skye 'phel mi rgyu mi chags stobs kyis sang / gzugs med sa gcig ther gzugs yid kyi gzugs 
240b1(kha): can nyid/ re dgs yid gnyis so sor brtags pas sanga/ gzugs med sa gcig bar ma de'i gnas/ 'khor bar zhugs 'jug ldog dang gsum gyis sang / de ltar sa dgu rim pas / 
240b2(kha): phye ba'i bye brag la/ nyon mongs pa yi spyod pa ram gyis sang / de ltar nyon mongs pa yi sgrib pa byang nas/ shes bya'i sgrib pa mngon du sdod cig rgyu/ khams gsum sems can skye rga / 
240b3(kha): na 'chi bzhi la gnas/ de bzhin brgal bar shes pa de nyid ni/ shes bya'i nga rgyal cha phra ba'i sgrib pa'o// kun gzhi byang chub sems la sgrib pa'o// shes bya'i sgrib pa rgyu na shes 
240b4(kha): par bya ba'i yul/ bla na med par yang dag par s+dzogs pa'i 'bras bu nyid/ de la sgrib pa che ba'i nga rgyal ca phra nyid/ de nas rim pa bcu gsum gyen la gnam skas rim gyis brtsi/ 
240b5(kha): de skad ces bka' bsrtsal to// de la btsun pa khyab pa la sogs nyan pa'i 'khor rnams kyis sar gsol pa/ bcu gsum gnam skas gyen la rtsi ba'i grangs dang go rim dngos po 
240b6(kha): ji ltar lags pa zhig/ thugs kyi dkyil nas bden pa'i don byung la/ bdag cag nyan pa'i 'khor la bshad par zhu/ de skad ces gsol to// de la ston pas bka' b srtsal pa/ 
241a1(kha): grangs dang gorim dngos po 'di lhar ro// grangs ni dang po dmigs pa'dad pa dang gcig/ mi dmigs pa'i shes rab dang gnyis/ mi chags pa'i rdul thugs dang gsum/ mi / 
241a2(kha): mnyam pa'i stobs mchog dang ban/ m rtog pa'i yo shes dang lnga/ m thrub pa'i rgyal mtshan dang drug/ mzheg pa'i gsas mkhar dang bdun/ me brjod pa'i gzungs dang brgyad/ ma 
241a3(kha): 'khrul pa'i blo dang dgu/ mi yengs pa'i man ngag dang bcu/ mi 'gyur ba'i g.sung rung dang bcu gcig/ mi 'byed pa'i mnyam pa dang bcu gnyis/ mi snang ba'i snang ba dang bcu gsum/ de 
241a4(kha): ltar bcu gsum ni gnam rim pa bcu gsum zhes bya ste/ zla ba ches pa bzhin du ye shes rim pas bskyed/ de ltar rnams ni grangs kyi gtan tshigs so// go rim dang po kho nar 
241a5(kha): dmigs pa'i dad pas bode nams tshogs bsogs pa yin te/ gnam rim pa gcig gi steng du dmigs pa'i dad pa skyes tsam na/ phye gzung ba'i yul nod bcud dang / nang 'dzin / 
241a6(kha): pa'i sems shes pa gnyis/ 'khrul pa'i dbang gis/ mig gi srdze gor bzhin du/ med bzhin du yod par mthong bas/ bsod nams dbang gis dge sdig gi tshogs/ me long g.ya' dag 
241b1(kha): bzhin du gsal te/ skye 'jigs n 'dar g.yang za ngo tsha'i nas dang ldan/ dmigs pa'i rin med don la mi dmigs so// gnam rim pa gnyis kyi steng du mi dmigs pa'i shes rab / 
241b2(kha): skyes te/ 'khor b thog ma med pa'i dus nas dg sdig ci byas pa/ shes pas gsal bar rtog pas sgyu ma nyid du gsal/ dmigs pa'i yul med mi dmigs pa'i zhes rab skye ba'o// 
241b3(kha): de nas gnam rim pa gsum gyi steng du mi chags pa'i rdul zhugs skyes te/ 'khor ba zang zing sgyu ma'i rang bzhin la/ yul dang dbang po 'phrad ting 'dzin stobs dang ldan/ mi chags 
241b4(kha): gnyis med don la nges pa'o// gnam rim pa bzhi'i steng du / mi mnyam pa'i stobs mchog gis/ thun mong ma yin pa'i blo rnyed de/ khams gsum s dgu'i sdug bsngal bag / 
241b5(kha): chags gdar thag chod do// gnam rim pa lnga'i steng du / mi rtog pa'i ye shes rang bzhin gyis shar/ sdug bsngal 'khor ba'i yul rjes su 'khrul pas brtags su mi thub pa'i 
241b6(kha): gzhis/ mi rtog pa'i ye shes shar zhes de la bya'o// gnam rim pa drug gi steng du mi nub pa'i rgyal mtshan tshugs/ sdug bsngal skye len 'khor ba'i 'dam nang du / byang chub 
242a1(kha): / by/ sems nyid gting dpag nus mtha med/ thun mong ma yin rgyal mtshan bzhin du brjed pas mi nub pa'i rgyal mtshan tshugs zhes de la bya'o// gnam rim pa bdun 
242a2(kha): gyi steng du/ mzheg pa'i gsas mthar brtsigs te/ bag chags rjes susangs kyin bdud kyi chu bni skam/ kun gne rnam par zhes pa do ni mi sheg pa'i rgyu/ yon tan kun 
242a3(kha): s+dzogs gsas kyi mkhar du brtsegs pa ra/ mi zhig pa'i gsas mkhar brtsigs zhes de la bya'o// gnam rim pa brgyad kyi steng du mi brjed pa'i gzungs thob ste/ kun gzhi byang / 
242a4(kha): chub sems ni byung sher sgor mi 'byung / skyon med yon tan s+dzogs pas brjed pa'i sgrib pa dang bral/ de yi phyir mi brjed pa'i gzungs thob pa zhes bya'o// gnam rim pa dgu'i steng 
242a5(kha): du mi 'khrul pa'i blar phyin te/ thams cad sgyu mar rig nas mtshan ma'i yul las 'das/ snang srid dngos por bzung ba'i 'khrul pa'i blo g.yengs bas/ kun gzhi byang chub sems 
242a6(kha): kyi mi 'khrul so sor rtogs pas su / mi 'khrul pa'i blar phyin zhes kyang de la bya'o// gnam rim bcu yi steng du mi yengs pa'i man ngag dang ldan te/ thams cad sgyu mar rig pas 
242b1(kha): mtshan ma'i rjes mi gcod/ snang srid 'khrul bar rtogs pas yengs ba'i rnam par ma mchis/ man ngag thig ler rtogs pas don dang rab tu ldan/ de'i phyir na mi yengs pa'i man / 
242b2(kha): ngag dang ldan zhes kyang bya'o// gnam rim pa bcu gcig gi steng du mi 'gyur ba'i gsung drung la gnas te/ mi mthun pa'i gnyen po rgod rkyang gnyis sangs te/ ma rtog byung bor blo 
242b3(kha): yais mtshan ma'i rjzes 'breng nas/ a rgod bzhin du zhin tu gdul dka' ba/ thugs rjes mzhor lung gis brtul nas zhin tu gsung / byung tsher mtshan ma'i rjes nas cag 
242b4(kha): chags bsam pas drang / cha rags bsam pa'i phyir nas 'brengs shing rgyang nas 'grim/ thugs rje ma nor lung gis mi 'phyo drung na gnas/ de ltar gnyen po rgod kyang gnyis spangs / 
242b5(kha): nas/ mi 'gyur g.sung du nyid la gnas pas su/ sems nyid mi 'gyur gsung dru nyid dang mthun pa'o// gnam rim pa bcu gnyis kyi steng du/ mi 'byed pa'i mnyam pa dang snyoms pa 
242b6(kha): ste/ ci ltar mkha' la gzha' chen grangs mang yang / nam mkha'i dbyings su res shig bye brag med/ mtshan ma'i bon la 'dzin chags grangs mang yang / bon nyid dbyings su bdag / 
243a1(kha): / bi/ gzhan phyogs ris med/ sems can blo la 'byung 'jug sna tshogs kyang / sems nyid mnyam par dbye shag phyogs ris med/ de'i phyir na mi 'byed mnyam pa'i cha la / 
243a2(kha): snyoms pa'o// gnam rim pa bcu gsum gyi steng du / mi snang pa'i snang ba dang 'tshigs te/ bon nyid ye nas mi snang pa la snang ba'i bon sku dngos su grub/ bon sku ye dag mkha' ltar 
243a3(kha): mnyam pa la/ thun mong ma yin pa'i s+dzogs sku dngos su grub/ s+dzogs sku gzi brjid ngo mtshar che ba'i klong dkyil nas/ sprul sku ci ltar 'dul ba dngos po mtshen bar grub/ con 
243a4(kha): nyid sems nyid nam mkha' dbyings nyid gsum/ ye nas skye ba med la skye ba'i cho 'drul 'byung / don du skye ba med pas skye ba 'byung / skye ba nyid la skye ba med/ de'i phyir na mi snang 
243a5(kha): pa'i snang ba tshigs zhes bya'o// yon tan de ltar dang ldan nas sdod 'gro ba'i don nus te/ sems can gyi rgyu drug lnga'i sa bin/ rtsi rnam pa lngaru gyur ste/ gti mug rnam par rig 
243a6(kha): pa'i rtsir 'gyur ro// 'dod chags chags med sbyin pa'i rtsir 'gyur ro// zhe sdang tshad med byams pa'i rtsir 'gyur ro// phrag dog dag med yangs pa'i rtser 'gyur ro// nga rgyal che med / 
243b1(kha): zhi ba'i rtsar 'gyur ro// de ltar drug lnga rtser lngar 'gyur bas su/ bdag dang gzhan med 'gro don rgya lag byad pa'o// rgyu drug lnga'i 'bras ba phung po lnga'i bag chags kyang / sku rnam / 
243b2(kha): pa lngar gyur te/ gzugs kyi phung po gar gsas btsan po' sku ru gyur ro// tser ba'i phung po rgad gsas khams pa'i sku ru 'gyur/ 'du zhes kyi phung po gss je mang po'i sku ru 'gyur/ 
243b3(kha): 'dkhyed kyi phung po gnam gsas dbyeng rnam gyi sku ru 'gyur/ rnam par shes pa'i phung po gzan l+ha 'di dkar gyi sku ru 'gyur/ dug lnga'i 'bras ba phung po lnga/ lha lnga rgu la byur 
243b4(kha): tsam na/ bdag dang gzhan med 'gro don rgya lag spyad pa'o// lha lnga sku yang ye shes lnga ru gsal/ gar gsas btsan po'i sku mdog phyag mtshan gdan khri yang / dngos po dngs / 
243b5(kha): med btsal phyir me long lta bu'i ye shes so// me long g.ya' dag gzugs brnyan rang las 'byung ba bzhin/ sku dang ye shes mnyam pas thams cad bon du gsal ba'o// gsal la 
243b6(kha): rtog pa med pa dbu ma'i thig ler bzhag/ rgod gsas khams pa'i sku mdog phyag mtshan gdan khri yang / dngos po dngos med btsal pbyir bya bzhan gyi ye shes so// bya bazni 'gro / 
244a1(kha): b'i don la' pa'o// nan tan zn dul pa sku'i rnams bskyed pa'o// yizhe zhi bon nyid semn nyid gcig las gcig gsal ba'o/ de lta sku dang yo zhes gnyis/ 
244a2(kha): med mnyam pas su/ bdag dang gzhan med 'gro don rgya lag pyad pa'o// gsas je mang po'i sku mdog phyag mtshan gdan khri yang / dngos po dngos med btsal phyir so sor rtogs pa'i 
244a3(kha): ye shes so// so so ni sems can gyi las tha dad pa'o// rtogs ni ston pa'i thugs rjes 'byams yas pa'o// ye shes ni las dang thugs je ma tmongs gsal ba'o// de ltar sku dang 
244a4(kha): gnyis med mnyam pa'i nus mthu yis/ bdag dang gzhan med 'gro don rgya lag pyad pa'o// gnam sras dbyings rnam sku mdog phyag mtshan gdan khri yang / dngos po dngos med 
244a5(kha): btsal phyir mnyam pa nyid kyi ye shes so// thams cad rtogs na bdag dang gzhan med mnyam/ bdag nyid gzhan nyid mkha' dang klong la gcig/ zer dang nyi ma mnyam pa'i blo shar na/ 
244a6(kha): ye shes chen po yongs su rgya ma chad/ bdag dang gzhan med 'gro don rgya lag pyad pa'o// gshen lha 'od dkar sku mdog phyag mtshan gdan khri yang / dngos po dngos med btsal phyir / 
244b1(kha): stong pa nyid kyi ye shes so// 'di ltar snang ba thams cad ye nas stong pa'i rang bzhin yin/ bon nyid sems nyid ye nas stong par ma shes par/ 'khrul pa'i rjes su zhugs nas mtshan 
244b2(kha): mar rtog pa rnams/ dam pa'i don du stong la rgya ma chad kyin snang la dngos ma grub/ de lta bu'i sku dang ye zhes gnyis med mnyam tsam na/ bdag dang gzhan med 'gro don rgya lag pyad 
244b3(kha): pa'o// de ltar sku lnga ye shes lngar 'gyur ba'i dus tsam na/ ye ni mtshan ma'i yul las 'das/ shes ni rig pa'i rtsal la s+dzogs/ sgom du ci yang med pa la/ mi yangs blo ldan 
244b4(kha): shes rab bzhag pa'i tshad/ ches gcig zhag pri sum cur rgugs gnyid spangs/ lus dben dbugs kyi cha snyoms phyag rgya'i skur ldan na/ thar pa chen po'i drid tshad dang du len 
244b5(kha): pa'o// nyan pa'i 'khor rnams dad pa'i sems kyis zungs/ tshig tu grangs mang bye ma'i la bstan kyang / don gyi thig le gcig las ngas ma gsungs/ de la ne'u chung la sogs pa'i 
244b6(kha): 'khor rnams kyis yang gsol pa/ thams cad s ler gsal ba'i ston pa'i sgrin ma lags/ bdag cag la sogs blo ldan dad can rnams kyis/ kun gzhi'i dkyil du mi 'tshor 
245a1(kha): gzer du thebs/ skye ba gcig gis thar pa chen po thab/ blo dmana rnams la thig le'i bka' lung 'ga'/ bkred rang don du sten pas bka' 'ga' stsol/ de skad 
245a2(kha): ces gnsol te// de la ston pas bka' bsrtsal pa/ bdag kyang 'gro ba'i 'dren ston bya ru 'khor ba'i sa la 'ong / mi 'byed sems kyi gzhi mas yongs su zen par bzung / lus 
245a3(kha): kyis cir sgyur ngag gis ci bsgrags dang / yon tan cin se la 'phrin las ci mdzad yo/ sems can tha dad mang po bkrid cing drang phyir mdzad pa'o// de yang modo ru bsdus nas tshig 
245a4(kha): 'ga' gdams ngag bshad/ gsung dung bon gyi sgo mo brgyad khri bzhi stong la/ md ru bsdus na rnam pa gsum du 'dus/ gsum gyi nges bzung khyed la 'di ltar ston/ ban thams cad 
245a5(kha): la dang po 'dzin pa'i rgyu dang gcig/ bar du rtogs pa'i rkyen dang gnyis/ tha bar rtogs pa'i 'bras bu dang gsum/ de la dang po 'dzin pa'i rgyu la glegs bam gces pas/ yi gnag 
245a6(kha): po'i rgyud la zhin tu bkur ste bya/ bar du rtogs pa rkyen la slob dpon bla ma gces pas/ slob dpon bla ma'i sku la rab tu 'khor bar bya/ mtha' mar rtogs pa'i 'bras bu rang gi 
245b1(kha): rig pa gces pas/ gzhan la ma yengs rig pa'i shes rab sbyongs/ de ltar nyan pa'i 'khor sde rnam pa kun/ dang po 'dzin pa'i blo yis zungs/ bar du brtags pa'i blo yis rtogs/ tha / 
245b2(kha): ma rtogs pa'i blo yais sgoms/ kun gzhi' song len gsal thebs nas/ 'bras bu thar pa grub pa nges/ de skad cis ston pas bka' b rtsal te// de nas ston pa gnhen rab ma / 
245b3(kha): ci yang / skye ba gcig gis thar pa chen po bsgrub pa'i phyir/ g.yengs pa'i 'khor rnams sangs nas/ nags tshal dgon par gzhegs/ sud kyi 'khor sde rnams las skal bzang
245b4(kha): dad ldan rnams/ lha spyod zung du 'brel nas gnhen rab ci bzhin du/ skye ba gcig gis thar pa chen po bsgrub pa'i phyir/ dgon pa'i gnas su so sor don la zhugs nas spyod/ 
245b5(kha): thig ler don dam ma rtogs pa'i 'khor sde sud ma kun/ spyod pa mas 'djigs 'dul khrims sde yis bsungs/ me dang lha yi go 'phang rim bgrod nas/ thar pa chen po 'bras bu sdod 
245b6(kha): cig 'grub/ ston pas 'khor spangs dgon pa mdzad pa'i le'u ste bcu drug pa'o// // g.sung rung lha'i skad du na/ yad ma dal 'di a par zer gling pyod/ gang zag mi yi skad du na/ 
246a1(kha): rton pai tag mya zha 'da pa'i 'o'o// ce nyid 'jignyon em chens skad d// sngon kyi bhon pa btab 'i bragl bla s / gshon raba bd gzog/ 
246a2(kha): sa nas 'gro don mdzad/ sku gsung thugs dang gsum gyis 'dul ba'i ram pa mdzad/ yon tan de'i sems can bder bkod mang / da ni dus kyi tha mar nye bas su/ ston pa zhal 
246a3(kha): bzhugs 'gro ba'i don mdzad kyang / sems can skye 'phel gzhan nas 'phos pa rnams/ las ma dag par dus kyi snigs mar skyes/ sems can 'dul ba'i dus tshegs zhan pas / 
246a4(kha): su/ ston pa gcig pu dgon par gshegs/ mi rtag sku nyid 'gyur bar bstan nas 'dul ba'i dus yin pas/ ston pa mi rtag mya ngan gling la 'da' bar dgongs/ sngon gyi ston pa snga 
246a5(kha): rabs 'das pa yang / sku gsung thugs kyi bstan pa s+dzogs nas 'da' ba'i tshad/ de'i rjes dang mthun par mdzad pas kyang / ston pa mya ngan gling la 'da' bar dgongs/ sngon gyi smon / 
246a6(kha): lam btab pa'i tshad s+dzogs nas/ 'gro ba'i don yang ran pa yin pas kyang / ston pa mya ngan gling la 'da' bar dgongs/ khams gsum sems can thams cad skye dang 'chi la rtag/ 
246b1(kha): skye ba'i rgo dgag pa'i phyir du gong gi mdzad thabs bstan/ 'chi ba'i phan gdags phyir du mya ngan 'da' tshul bstan/ ston pas rnam bzhi'i 'khor rnams la/ tshigs su bcad de 
246b2(kha): bka' brtsal pa'i mad/ sgyu ma'i lus blangs sdug bsngal na tsha'i rgyu/ phung po lus kyi rnam szhes sems bltams pas/ skye dang rgas kyi sdug bsngal rim gyis byung / d lta na ba'i 
246b3(kha): sdug bsngal mtshe dang 'grogs/ sdug bsngal nad kyis drangs pas 'chi ba'i rtags/ me rtag bzhi bsdus gzugs kyi phung po la/ 'jigs pa'i gnyen po 'du ba'i nad dar bas/ rin 
246b4(kha): chen srog la bab par gtugs te na/ de skad smras nas ston pas 'khor la bka' bstsal pas/ 'khor rnams kyang kun ka bsngangs nas skrag par gyur/ gshen rab dgongs pa'i 
246b5(kha): gnas nas/ 'khor lo'i kha la rin chen sku btegs nas/ bkra zhis po brang khri smon rgyal bzhad kyi/ yang thug tu dgongs par na nam gdan la bzhag/ de nas gto bu 'bum 
246b6(kha): sangs kyis/ ston pa 'khor dang bcas pa rnams la zhus pa'i mod/ ston pa gnhen rab lta bu'i rin chen sku lus kyang / sdug bsngal tsha grang nad kyis gdungs te snkung ba 'di/ sgyu ma'i / 
247a1(kha): lus blangs sems can tag tu re bsnyin ro rje/ d pas stobs byang dge b cang bcad stobs dang ldan par dpya/ rnam pa thams cad bakyen pa'i gnen rab lags/ gu 
247a2(kha): lus nad kyis gdung ste snung pa 'di/ nad bsal gso ba'i thabs rnams gang mthun pa/ gsal ba'i sgron mas bdag cag 'khor la bka' b rtsal 'tshal/ de skad ces gto bus 
247a3(kha): yongs su gsol bas/ sgra thos pa'i sems can kun/ shin tu gdungs shing rab tu dad pa skyes/ snang srid ston pa gshen rab mi bo yang / dka' ba sna tshogs kyis dge ba spyod lugs 
247a4(kha): dang / sku la sdug bsngal sna tshogs nying la/ sdung gis 'debs lugs kyis/ mtha' yas sems can rnams rtag tu ra ba 'o re brgyal/ de skad yongs su so sr nas smras nas/ don 
247a5(kha): med 'khrul pa'i 'jig rten las sangs nas/ ston pas dge ba'i khrims phog lung bstan pa rnams/ shes pa'i rim pas dge ba cang spyad spyod/ dus der ston pas mal nas dbu 
247a6(kha): btegs nas/ 'khor la tshigs su bcad de gsungs pa/ bdag kyang dka' ba spyad nas sdig pa spangs ba yang / skye rga na 'chi bzhi las thar nas bde ba'i gnas bsnyeg phyir/ byas 
247b1(kha): pas ma zin sgyu ma'i zang zing phyir spangs nas/ nags tshal dgon pa'i gnas su gcig pur gnas pa yin/ mi rtag 'pho 'gyur gang du dran pa yis/ dka' ba sna tshogs spyad pas 
247b2(kha): sems kyi nyon mongs sangs/ sgyu ma'i lus dang bral yang ngan so rgyur mi skye/ yang dag grub pa'i gnas su bdag nyid bde ba'o// 'du ba'i nad rnams dar ba la/ kun s+dzob las ni dngos / 
247b3(kha): su bden pa yi/ gal te bgegs kyis bar chad byed pa srid/ bgegs la gtos phan gto bus gto rnams gyis/ de skad ces ston pas bka' bstsal pas/ gto bu 'bum sangs 
247b4(kha): la sogs 'khor rnams kyis/ bgegs rnams bcom zhing bdud la sku glud btang / gto dang smrang dang yas stags yon tan gyis/ gnhen rab snung ba dgung gsum bde bar 'gyur/ 
247b5(kha): rnam pa thams cad mkhyen pa de nyid kyis/ mtha' yas sems can nyon mongs la/ bgegs la gtis pan mi bsgrub pa yi phyir/ kun s+dzob dngos su re zhig bstan pa tsam/ dgung 
247b6(kha): gsum leon nas phyir lazhin tu snung / dpyad bu khri shes kyis sus btsugs thal sbyar nas/ ston pa gzim pa'i sngas su zhus pa'i md/ rnam pa thams cad mkhyen pa'i gnhen rab 
248a1(kha): lags/ sku lus nad kyis gdungs te sbung ba la/ nad rnams gos ba'i thabs rnams gang mbthun pa/ gsal ba'i shron mas bdag cag 'khor la bka' b rtsal / 
248a2(kha): 'tshal/ de la ston pas dbu btegs nas gsungs pa'i mdo/ sgyru ma'i lus la 'du ba'i nad dar bas/ kun s+dzob mtshan ma dngos su bstan pa yis/ bzhi brgya nad kyi bar chad yin 
248a3(kha): pa'ang srid/ dpyad bu khri shes rig pa'i tshad ma can/ sdug bsngal nad kyi bar chad gdul ba'i phyir/ 'tsho ba'i mdo rtogs gso ba'i sman sbyor la/ nad kyi rig byed dpyad kyi raim pa gyis/ 
248a4(kha): de yang dam pa'i don du dpyad mi nub pa'o// dpyad bu khri shes la sogs 'khor pa mang po yis/ rtsa dang chu brtags nad kyi rigs byed nas/ drod dang bsal ba'i sman rnams cha sbyar kyin/ 
248a5(kha): 'du ba'i nad 'dul dpyad rnams s+dzogs par byas/ byin gyis brlabs te dgung gsum bde bar gyur/ de nas shin tu sar la bsdungs so// de la 'khor gyis bskor nas kun gyis zhus

298b5(kha): na/ bon gyi pgra grogs bon gyi byin pa mchog/ dga' dag sems gyis phyag bya las sogs te/ son lam dam pa 'di dag ' bas pa la/ gang mgis chad cig e la rab los na/ steng gsul 'jig rten 
298b6(kha): ma lus thams cad la/ zas sgom tshems par byas pa dag dang 'dra/ gang zhig dang pa'i sems kyis 'dzin byed pa/ dus gsum gshen rab ma lus thams cad la/ zhabs nas btegs pa'i mchod pa byas dang / 
299a1(kha): / b/ 'dra/ gang thig' pas 'di la 'bro bya na/ yi ge 'bru res btsal pa grangs nyed du/ 'khor lo bgyur ba'i rgyal po'i lus thob nas/ 'gro bzhams la ji ltar 'tshams par 'dal/ gans/ 
299a2(kha): zhig dad pas 'di la bkyur bsgo bya// thad cig tsam la bsod nams dpag med d// brzal pa zhing gis rul zedg bgrangs pa yang / gshen rab zhal mthong ngan song gnas nas dpag/ rim gro phung du byas / 
299a3(kha): pa'i bsod nams la/ dang po'i sems gyis mod 'di gnas pa'i sar/ gom gcig bor ba'i thad cig sems dang ni/ khams gsum gang ba'i sems can thams cad la/ srog byin dga' ba byas pas char 
299a4(kha): mi nye/ gang zhig mod 'd zhes nas bsgrub byed na/ ngan song gsum po gtan nas yang ba dang / 'khor ba'i rgya mtsho gting nas btsam par 'gyur/ mtha' 'khob ginsg gu na bas thos mi 'gyur/ bdud gyis 
299a5(kha): mi bdru grogs ngan gtan nas yang / gshen lha 'a dgar zhal yang myur mthong 'gyur/ gang du skyes pa bsod nams longs spyong rgyas/ 'gro ba 'dren po'i ston pa myur thob 'gyur/ gang zhig yid bzhin bor /

299b1(kha): len par mi 'gyur te/ thugs rjes sems can rnams la 'tshams par ston/ khams gsum nyes pas zung pa mi 'gyur te/ sma 'dam nas skyes pa ji bzhin 'gyur/ gzhan yang 'di yi yon tan bsam /

300a1(kha): yi/ bzang po' bya bznals/ nges ng brgya pa'i 'brel tsob 'gro bzhams bu le byang chub byar thob khyir bor/ grub mchen lu khaMs bstan pa j bci'd / rkgyal ba gsegs kyang bas

300a3(kha): gshegs pa'i gsung db don po me dag bnhengs par bsgyun mdzad pa'i dge bsngo chen chig tu bstan rnam bgros pes rtse gcig tu chen pa phrul bo'// satha mad la/ khri bstan nad bu rtse yi ni gnas nas phrul// cmhu thrul zlag

300a5(kha): byung po lha rgyal ni dgen gyi lag bris yig dkad dos rnying zhig dang / byung po sed tsha de ba nyin lcags rtse tshang gi lag bris yig nag dp rning / byung po sndang chen go dgen gyi lag bris yig dkad dp sning / byung po seMd tsha nad / 
300a6(kha): thang bya brang gi lag bris yig dkar gsed dul bkra ma'i dpe rnying / 'bre ru klu mthad dgen gyi lag bris yig dkad gsed dul bkra ma'i dse rnying dang / byung po snang cen chad// gen bsam gtan ye shes kyis nyad tshags thub pa// / 
300a1(kha): / by'/ bzang po' bya bzhams/ nges ang brgyad pa'i 'brel thog 'gro bznams byu me byang chub myar du thob phyir brjo/ grub mkhyen lung baMs bstan paji bzhin a / rgyal ba gshegs kyang gsung 
300a2(kha): rab rin po ched/ bdri zhu bkyur bsde gyis zhes bgrubs pa'i dgs/ gshen bstan 'dzin pas sa chen 'gengs gyur cig/ ces byung po sdang cen dgon gyi dpen gsas bla la rgya mtsho' nad bu don po ces bde cad /

300a6(kha): phang bra brang gi lag bris yig dkad gsed dul bkra ma'i dse rnying / 'bri u klu mthad dgen gyi lag bris yig dkar gsed d/ dgul bkra ma'i dpe rnying dang / byung po sdeng cen chad// gen bsam gtan yo shes kyis nyad tshags thub pa// / 
300b1(kha): rho nhad bu mo'i chab gser la/ sprul ku ba ldan rnying po'i phyag bris gyis bzhengs pad grags pa'i gsed des yig dkad pi rnying bcas/ zhus bgrigs byed pa'i mthe 'den bka' g.yad gnang byung ba de rnams kyis/ geng gsal dNsa /

300b3(kha): khus bgrigs byas yed kyang ddung ma rtegs dbang gis chad lhag segs yod nges te/ spyo la #bbyad sngen lo nga lnga brgya ldag nas gangs can bad kyi yrul du yi go' pad cang 'bjrugs brskun dang // se gni legs bgrigs /

300b5(kha): gzni dken pas gam cha gsad du yin pa dang / sghes su de zhus bgrigs pa tshe yang mkhyen dpyed dab 'byams pa min chad/ 'di' thad mthun rkyen rung la 'gal rkyen mang ba'i gseb ru dul brling 'grog pa dang ma byung na/ phyegs /
